i want to tweak the data delivered by league/get_team_week_details_table.
the col headerrs should not contain "Game 0...n" but reather the name of the opposing team the current team played against in the match.
also add a row Total at the bottom tha sums all results and points of all players in the respecctive game. 
also add vbars after the individual results and after the team reaults and after the opposing team results

Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get team totals (computed data)\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            # Get opponent team totals\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }",

            "text": "            # Get opponent team totals\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 539,
            "text": "            opponent_filters = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 540,
            "text": "                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 541,
            "text": "                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 542,
            "text": "                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 543,
            "text": "                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 544,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_details_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"Get team week details as a TableData object for rendering\"\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            # Get individual player results for the team\r\n            player_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            player_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=player_filters)\r\n            \r\n            if player_data.empty:\r\n                return TableData(\r\n                    columns=[],\r\n                    data=[],\r\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get team totals (computed data)\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            # Get opponent team totals\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedView = document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Update header\r\n    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r\n    document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata').innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r\n    \r\n    // Determine endpoint based on selected view\r\n    const endpoint = selectedView === 'headToHead' \r\n        ? '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table'\r\n        : '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r\n    \r\n    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        options: {\r\n            disablePositionCircle: true,\r\n            mergeCells: selectedView === 'headToHead'\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedView = document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Update header\r\n    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r\n    document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata').innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r\n    \r\n    // Determine endpoint based on selected view\r\n    const endpoint = selectedView === 'headToHead' \r\n        ? '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table'\r\n        : '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r\n    \r\n    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        options: {\r\n            disablePositionCircle: true,\r\n            mergeCells: selectedView === 'headToHead'\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get details for a specific team in a specific week\"\"\"\r\n        # Create a query for this specific team, league, season, and week\r\n        query = LeagueQuery(season=season, league=league, team=team, week=week)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the data\r\n        team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(query.to_filter_dict())\r\n        \r\n        if team_data.empty:\r\n            return {\"config\": []}\r\n        \r\n        # Process the data into the expected format for the frontend\r\n        config = []\r\n        \r\n        # Add player details\r\n        for _, row in team_data.iterrows():\r\n            if \"Player\" in team_data.columns and \"Score\" in team_data.columns and \"Opponent\" in team_data.columns:\r\n                player_detail = {\r\n                    \"player\": row.get(\"Player\", \"\"),\r\n                    \"score\": row.get(\"Score\", 0),\r\n                    \"opponent\": row.get(\"Opponent\", \"\")\r\n                }\r\n                config.append(player_detail)\r\n        \r\n        return {\"config\": config}",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Get details for a specific team in a specific week\"\"\"\r\n        # Create a query for this specific team, league, season, and week\r\n        query = LeagueQuery(season=season, league=league, team=team, week=week)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the data\r\n        team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(query.to_filter_dict())\r\n        \r\n        if team_data.empty:\r\n            return {\"config\": []}\r\n        \r\n        # Process the data into the expected format for the frontend\r\n        config = []\r\n        \r\n        # Add player details\r\n        for _, row in team_data.iterrows():\r\n            if \"Player\" in team_data.columns and \"Score\" in team_data.columns and \"Opponent\" in team_data.columns:\r\n                player_detail = {\r\n                    \"player\": row.get(\"Player\", \"\"),\r\n                    \"score\": row.get(\"Score\", 0),\r\n                    \"opponent\": row.get(\"Opponent\", \"\")\r\n                }\r\n                config.append(player_detail)\r\n        \r\n        return {\"config\": config}",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details')\r\ndef get_team_week_details():\r\n    \r\n    season = request.args.get('season')\r\n    week = request.args.get('week')\r\n    team = request.args.get('team')\r\n    league = request.args.get('league')\r\n    \r\n    print(f\"Team Week Details - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n\r\n    week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n    \r\n    details = league_service.get_team_week_details(league, season, team, week)\r\n    print(details)\r\n    \r\n    return jsonify({'config': details})",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details')\r\ndef get_team_week_details():\r\n    \r\n    season = request.args.get('season')\r\n    week = request.args.get('week')\r\n    team = request.args.get('team')\r\n    league = request.args.get('league')\r\n    \r\n    print(f\"Team Week Details - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n\r\n    week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n    \r\n    details = league_service.get_team_week_details(league, season, team, week)\r\n    print(details)\r\n    \r\n    return jsonify({'config': details})",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\r\n        \"\"\"Get detailed team results for a specific week including individual and team stats\"\"\"\r\n        \r\n        # Get individual player results\r\n        player_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: False\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        player_opponent_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: False\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        player_columns = [\r\n            Columns.player_name,\r\n            Columns.score,\r\n            Columns.points,\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent,\r\n            Columns.match_number,\r\n            Columns.position, \r\n            Columns.week\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        player_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=player_columns,\r\n            filters_eq=player_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"player_data: \\n\" + str(player_data))\r\n        \r\n        player_opponent_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=player_columns,\r\n            filters_eq=player_opponent_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"player_opponent_data: \\n\" + str(player_opponent_data))\r\n\r\n        #         "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\r\n        \"\"\"Get detailed team results for a specific week including individual and team stats\"\"\"\r\n        \r\n        # Get individual player results\r\n        player_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: False\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        player_opponent_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: False\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        player_columns = [\r\n            Columns.player_name,\r\n            Columns.score,\r\n            Columns.points,\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent,\r\n            Columns.match_number,\r\n            Columns.position, \r\n            Columns.week\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        player_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=player_columns,\r\n            filters_eq=player_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"player_data: \\n\" + str(player_data))\r\n        \r\n        player_opponent_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=player_columns,\r\n            filters_eq=player_opponent_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"player_opponent_data: \\n\" + str(player_opponent_data))\r\n\r\n        # Get team results\r\n        team_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: True\r\n        }",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\n\r\n            \r\n            ...\n\r\n            \r\n            # Add opponent total row\r\n            if not opponent_data.empty:\r\n                # Start with position and name\r\n                opponent_row = [\"Team\", \"Opponents\"]\r\n                \r\n                # Add game data for opponents\r\n                for game in games:\r\n                    game_data = opponent_data[opponent_data[Columns.round_number] == game]\r\n                    if not game_data.empty:\r\n                        opponent_row.append(int(game_data[Columns.score].iloc[0]))\r\n                        opponent_row.append(round(float(game_data[Columns.points].iloc[0]), 1))\r\n                    else:\r\n                        opponent_row.append(0)\r\n                        opponent_row.append(0)\r\n                \r\n                # Calculate opponent totals\r\n                opponent_row.append(int(opponent_data[Columns.points].sum()))\r\n                opponent_row.append(int(opponent_data[Columns.score].sum()))\r\n                opponent_row.append(round(float(opponent_data[Columns.score].mean()), 1) if len(opponent_data) \u003e 0 else 0)\r\n                \r\n                data.append(opponent_row)\r\n            \r\n            return TableData(\r\n                columns=columns,\r\n                data=data,\r\n                title=f\"{team} - Match Day {week}\",\r\n                description=f\"Score sheet for {team} in {league} - {season}\",\r\n                config={\r\n                    \"stickyHeader\": True,\r\n                    \"striped\": True,\r\n                    \"hover\": True,\r\n                    \"responsive\": True,\r\n                    \"compact\": False\r\n                }\r\n            )\r\n            \r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table_data: {e}\")\r\n            return TableData(\r\n                columns=[],\r\n                data=[],\r\n                title=f\"Error loading data for {team} - Week {week}\"\r\n            )",

        "originalContents": "\r\n            \r\n            # Add team total row\r\n            if not team_data.empty:\r\n                # Start with position and name\r\n                team_row = [\"Team\", team]\r\n                \r\n                # Add game data for team\r\n                for game in games:\r\n                    game_data = team_data[team_data[Columns.round_number] == game]\r\n                    if not game_data.empty:\r\n                        team_row.append(int(game_data[Columns.score].iloc[0]))\r\n                        team_row.append(round(float(game_data[Columns.points].iloc[0]), 1))\r\n                    else:\r\n                        team_row.append(0)\r\n                        team_row.append(0)\r\n                \r\n                # Calculate team totals\r\n                team_row.append(int(team_data[Columns.points].sum()))\r\n                team_row.append(int(team_data[Columns.score].sum()))\r\n                team_row.append(round(float(player_data[Columns.score].mean()), 1) if len(player_data) \u003e 0 else 0)\r\n                \r\n                data.append(team_row)",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n\r\n        ...\n\r\n\r\n        # Add team totals\r\n        team_row.update({\r\n            'Points_Total': float(round(team_data[Columns.points].sum(), 1)),\r\n            'Score_Total': int(team_data[Columns.score].sum()),\r\n            'Score_Average': float(round(player_data[Columns.score].mean(), 2)) if not np.isnan(team_data[Columns.score].mean()) else 0\r\n        })\r\n\r\n        # Add opponent totals\r\n        opponent_row.update({\r\n            'Points_Total': float(round(team_opponent_data[Columns.points].sum(), 1)),\r\n            'Score_Total': int(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].sum()),\r\n            'Score_Average': float(round(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].mean(), 2)) if not np.isnan(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].mean()) else 0\r\n        })\r\n        \r\n        rows.append(team_row)\r\n        rows.append(opponent_row)\r\n\r\n        # Prepare header groups for the table\r\n        header_groups = [\r\n            { 'title': 'Player', 'colspan': 2 }\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        # Add game columns\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            header_groups.append({ \r\n                'title': f'Game {game_idx}', \r\n                'colspan': 2 \r\n            })\r\n        \r\n        # Add totals column\r\n        header_groups.append({ \r\n            'title': 'Total', \r\n            'colspan': 3 \r\n        })\r\n\r\n        # Create columns based on number of games\r\n        columns = [\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Position',\r\n                'title': 'Pos',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Name',\r\n                'title': 'Name',\r\n                'className': 'text-start'\r\n            }\r\n        ]",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n        # Add team totals\r\n        team_row.update({\r\n            'Points_Total': float(round(team_data[Columns.points].sum(), 1)),\r\n            'Score_Total': int(team_data[Columns.score].sum()),\r\n            'Score_Average': float(round(player_data[Columns.score].mean(), 2)) if not np.isnan(team_data[Columns.score].mean()) else 0\r\n        })\r\n\r\n        # Add opponent totals\r\n        opponent_row.update({\r\n            'Points_Total': float(round(team_opponent_data[Columns.points].sum(), 1)),\r\n            'Score_Total': int(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].sum()),\r\n            'Score_Average': float(round(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].mean(), 2)) if not np.isnan(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].mean()) else 0\r\n        })\r\n        \r\n        rows.append(team_row)\r\n        rows.append(opponent_row)\r\n\r\n        # Prepare header groups for the table\r\n        header_groups = [\r\n            { 'title': 'Player', 'colspan': 2 }\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        # Add game columns\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            header_groups.append({ \r\n                'title': f'Game {game_idx}', \r\n                'colspan': 2 \r\n            })\r\n        \r\n        # Add totals column\r\n        header_groups.append({ \r\n            'title': 'Total', \r\n            'colspan': 3 \r\n        })\r\n\r\n        # Create columns based on number of games\r\n        columns = [\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Position',\r\n                'title': 'Pos',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Name',\r\n                'title': 'Name',\r\n                'className': 'text-start'\r\n            }\r\n        ]",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n\r\n        ...\n\r\n\r\n        team_opponent_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: True\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        columns_team = [Columns.score, Columns.points, Columns.team_name, Columns.team_name_opponent, Columns.week]\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n        team_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=columns_team,\r\n            filters_eq=team_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"team_data: \\n\" + str(team_data))\r\n        \r\n\r\n        team_opponent_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=columns_team,\r\n            filters_eq=team_opponent_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"team_opponent_data: \\n\" + str(team_opponent_data))\r\n\r\n        # Get number of games\r\n        n_games = len(player_data[Columns.team_name_opponent].unique())\r\n        \r\n        # Prepare player rows\r\n        rows = []\r\n        # Group by player to get their games\r\n        player_groups = player_data.groupby(Columns.player_name)\r\n        player_groups = sorted(player_groups, key=lambda x: x[1][Columns.position].iloc[0])",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each game\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            columns.extend([\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Score_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Score',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                },\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Points_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Pts',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                }\r\n            ])\r\n        \r\n        # Add total columns\r\n        columns.extend([\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Points_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Points',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Score',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Average',\r\n                'title': 'Avg',\r\n                'className': 'text-center',\r\n                'formatter': '(value || 0).toFixed(1)'\r\n            }\r\n        ])\r\n\r\n        # Create the complete table configuration matching the component's expected structure\r\n        table_config = {\r\n            'data': rows,  # The actual data rows\r\n            'columns': columns,  # Column definitions\r\n            'headerGroups': header_groups,  # Header group definitions\r\n            'rowNumbering': False,  # Disable row numbers\r\n            'positionChange': False,  # Disable position change indicators\r\n            'metadata': {  # Additional metadata\r\n                'league': league_name,\r\n                'season': season,\r\n                'week': week,\r\n                'location': 'TBD'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(table_config)\r\n        return table_config",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_league_history(self, league_name: str, season: str, week: int=None, depth: int=None, debug_output:bool=False) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a team's results in a given week.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            league_name (str): The name of the league.\r\n            season (str): The season.\r\n            team_name (str): The name of the team.\r\n            week (int): The week number.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The team's results for the given week.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns = [Columns.score, Columns.points, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: {'value': league_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': team_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters)",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a team's results in a given week.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            league_name (str): The name of the league.\r\n            season (str): The season.\r\n            team_name (str): The name of the team.\r\n            week (int): The week number.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The team's results for the given week.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns = [Columns.score, Columns.points, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: {'value': league_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': team_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_head_to_head_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week_str = request.args.get('week')\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Head-to-Head Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week_str}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week_str, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': 'Missing required parameters'}), 400\r\n        \r\n        week = int(week_str)\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_head_to_head_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_league_table_simple(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, include_history: bool = False) -\u003e TableData:\n\r\n            \r\n            ...\n\r\n            \r\n            if league_data.empty:\r\n                return TableData(\r\n                    columns=[],\r\n                    data=[],\r\n                    title=f\"No data available for {league} - {season}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get als and weeks\r\n            teams = league_data[Columns.team_name].unique()\r\n            all_weeks = sorted(league_data[Columns.week].unique())\r\n            \r\n            # Determine which weeks to show\r\n            if include_history:\r\n                weeks_to_show = [w for w in all_weeks if w \u003c= week]\r\n            else:\r\n                weeks_to_show = [week]\r\n            \r\n            # Calculate data for each team\r\n            team_data = {}\r\n            \r\n            for team in teams:\r\n                team_data[team] = {\r\n                    'weekly_data': {},\r\n                    'season_score': 0,\r\n                    'season_points': 0\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                # Get individual player data for this team (for scores and averages)\r\n                team_individual_data = individual_data[individual_data[Columns.team_name] == team]\r\n                \r\n                # Get team bonus data for this team (for team points only)\r\n                team_bonus_team_data = team_bonus_data[team_bonus_data[Columns.team_name] == team]\r\n                \r\n                # Calculate season totals (accumulated up to selected week)\r\n                if not team_individual_data.empty:\r\n                    # Filter individual data up to selected week\r\n                    team_individual_until_week = team_individual_data[team_individual_data[Columns.week] \u003c= week]\r\n                    team_data[team]['season_score'] = int(team_individual_until_week[Columns.score].sum())\r\n                    team_data[team]['season_points'] = float(team_individual_until_week[Columns.points].sum())",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        for player_name, player_games in player_groups:\r\n            player_row = {\r\n                'type': 'player',\r\n                'Position': int(player_games[Columns.position].iloc[0]),  # Get player's position\r\n                'Name': player_name\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            # Add each game's scores and points\r\n            for game_idx, (_, game) in enumerate(player_games.iterrows(), 1):\r\n                player_row[f'Score_{game_idx}'] = int(game[Columns.score])\r\n                player_row[f'Points_{game_idx}'] = float(round(game[Columns.points], 1))\r\n                \r\n            #       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"Get head-to-head comparison table data for a team vs their opponents in a specific week\"\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            # Get all matches for the team in this week\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            if team_data.empty:\r\n                return TableData(\r\n                    columns=[],\r\n                    data=[],\r\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get all matches for the opponent teams in this week\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            opponent_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_filters)",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"Get head-to-head comparison table data for a team vs their opponents in a specific week\"\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            # Get all matches for the team in this week\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            if team_data.empty:\r\n                return TableData(\r\n                    columns=[],\r\n                    data=[],\r\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get all matches for the opponent teams in this week\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            opponent_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_filters)",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_averages_simple(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n\r\n            \r\n            ...\n\r\n            \r\n            # Get all teams and weeks\r\n            teams = team_data[Columns.team_name].unique()\r\n            weeks = sorted(team_data[Columns.week].unique())\r\n            \r\n            for team in teams:\r\n                team_week_data = team_data[team_data[Columns.team_name] == team]\r\n                averages = []\r\n                \r\n                for week in weeks:\r\n                    week_data = team_week_data[team_week_data[Columns.week] == week]\r\n                    \r\n                    if not week_data.empty:\r\n                        averages.append(round(float(week_data[Columns.score].mean()), 2))\r\n                    else:\r\n                        averages.append(0)\r\n                \r\n                series_data.add_data(team, averages)\r\n            \r\n            return series_data.to_dict()\r\n            \r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            print(f\"Error in get_team_averages_simple: {e}\")\r\n            return SeriesData(\r\n                label_x_axis=\"Spieltag\", \r\n                label_y_axis=\"Durchschnitt\", \r\n                name=\"Durchschnitt im Saisonverlauf\", \r\n                query_params={\"season\": season, \"league\": league_name}\r\n            ).to_dict()\r\n\r\n    def get_league_week_table_simple(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Get a simplified league week table with direct data query.\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            season: The season identifier\r\n            league: The league name\r\n            week: The current week (if None, gets the latest)\r\n            \r\n        Returns:\r\n            TableData object with the league standings\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        return self.get_league_table_simple(season=season, league=league, week=week, include_history=False)",

            "text": "        return self.get_league_table_simple(season=season, league=league, week=week, include_history=False)"

        "originalContents": "\r\n            \r\n            # Get all teams and weeks\r\n            teams = team_data[Columns.team_name].unique()\r\n            weeks = sorted(team_data[Columns.week].unique())\r\n            \r\n            for team in teams:\r\n                team_week_data = team_data[team_data[Columns.team_name] == team]\r\n                averages = []\r\n                \r\n                for week in weeks:\r\n                    week_data = team_week_data[team_week_data[Columns.week] == week]\r\n                    \r\n                    if not week_data.empty:\r\n                        averages.append(round(float(week_data[Columns.score].mean()), 2))\r\n                    else:\r\n                        averages.append(0)\r\n                \r\n                series_data.add_data(team, averages)\r\n            \r\n            return series_data.to_dict()\r\n            \r\n        except Exception as e:\r\n            print(f\"Error in get_team_averages_simple: {e}\")\r\n            return SeriesData(\r\n                label_x_axis=\"Spieltag\", \r\n                label_y_axis=\"Durchschnitt\", \r\n                name=\"Durchschnitt im Saisonverlauf\", \r\n                query_params={\"season\": season, \"league\": league_name}\r\n            ).to_dict()\r\n\r\n    def get_league_week_table_simple(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Get a simplified league week table with direct data query.\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            season: The season identifier\r\n            league: The league name\r\n            week: The current week (if None, gets the latest)\r\n            \r\n        Returns:\r\n            TableData object with the league standings\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        return self.get_league_table_simple(season=season, league=league, week=week, include_history=False)",

Add team bonus points to season total (up to selected week)\r\n                if not team_bonus_team_data.empty:\r\n                    team_bonus_until_week = team_bonus_team_data[team_bonus_team_data[Columns.week] \u003c= week]\r\n                    team_data[team]['season_points'] += float(team_bonus_until_week[Columns.points].sum())\r\n                \r\n                # Calculate weekly data\r\n                for w in weeks_to_show:\r\n                    team_week_individual = team_individual_data[team_individual_data[Columns.week] == w]\r\n                    team_week_bonus = team_bonus_team_data[team_bonus_team_data[Columns.week] == w]\r\n                    \r\n                    if not team_week_individual.empty:\r\n                        week_score = int(team_week_individual[Columns.score].sum())\r\n                        week_points = float(team_week_individual[Columns.points].sum())\r\n                        week_avg = week_score / len(team_week_individual) if len(team_week_individual) \u003e 0 else 0\r\n                        \r\n                        #       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_league_week_table(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, depth: int = 1) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Get a formatted table for league standings with weekly breakdowns.\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            season: The season identifier\r\n            league: The league name\r\n            week: The current week (if None, gets the latest)\r\n            depth: How many previous weeks to include\r\n            \r\n        Returns:\r\n            TableData object with the league standings\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        # If week is not specified, get the latest week\r\n        if week is None:\r\n            week = self.get_latest_week(season, league)\r\n        \r\n        # Get team performances from the adapter\r\n        team_performances = self.adapter.get_league_standings(season, league, week)\r\n        \r\n        if not team_performances:\r\n            # Return empty table structure\r\n            return TableData(\r\n                columns=[],\r\n                data=[],\r\n                title=f\"No data available for {league} - {season}\"\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Sort by total points (descending) and assign positions\r\n        team_performances.sort(key=lambda x: (x.total_points, x.total_score), reverse=True)\r\n        for i, perf in enumerate(team_performances, 1):\r\n            perf.position = i\r\n        \r\n        # Create column groups\r\n        columns = [\r\n            ColumnGroup(\r\n                title=\"Ranking\",\r\n                frozen=\"left\",  # Freeze this group to the left\r\n                style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#f8f9fa\"},  # Light gray background\r\n                columns=[\r\n                    Column(title=\"#\", field=\"pos\", width=\"50px\", align=\"center\"),\r\n                    Column(title=\"Team\", field=\"team\", width=\"200px\", align=\"left\")\r\n                ]\r\n            )\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each week\r\n        start_week = max(1, week - depth + 1)",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_league_week_table(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, depth: int = 1) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Get a formatted table for league standings with weekly breakdowns.\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            season: The season identifier\r\n            league: The league name\r\n            week: The current week (if None, gets the latest)\r\n            depth: How many previous weeks to include\r\n            \r\n        Returns:\r\n            TableData object with the league standings\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        # If week is not specified, get the latest week\r\n        if week is None:\r\n            week = self.get_latest_week(season, league)\r\n        \r\n        # Get team performances from the adapter\r\n        team_performances = self.adapter.get_league_standings(season, league, week)\r\n        \r\n        if not team_performances:\r\n            # Return empty table structure\r\n            return TableData(\r\n                columns=[],\r\n                data=[],\r\n                title=f\"No data available for {league} - {season}\"\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Sort by total points (descending) and assign positions\r\n        team_performances.sort(key=lambda x: (x.total_points, x.total_score), reverse=True)\r\n        for i, perf in enumerate(team_performances, 1):\r\n            perf.position = i\r\n        \r\n        # Create column groups\r\n        columns = [\r\n            ColumnGroup(\r\n                title=\"Ranking\",\r\n                frozen=\"left\",  # Freeze this group to the left\r\n                style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#f8f9fa\"},  # Light gray background\r\n                columns=[\r\n                    Column(title=\"#\", field=\"pos\", width=\"50px\", align=\"center\"),\r\n                    Column(title=\"Team\", field=\"team\", width=\"200px\", align=\"left\")\r\n                ]\r\n            )\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each week\r\n        start_week = max(1, week -       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\n\r\n            \r\n            ...\n\r\n            \r\n            # Get team totals (computed data) for both teams\r\n            team_totals_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_totals_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_totals_filters)\r\n            \r\n            opponent_totals_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            opponent_totals_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_totals_filters)\r\n            \r\n            # Debug: Print unique combinations\r\n            print(f\"Team data unique combinations: {team_data[[Columns.round_number, Columns.match_number]].drop_duplicates().values.tolist()}\")\r\n            print(f\"Opponent data unique combinations: {opponent_data[[Columns.round_number, Columns.match_number]].drop_duplicates().values.tolist()}\")\r\n            \r\n            # Get unique round numbers (matches) for the team\r\n            team_rounds = sorted(team_data[Columns.round_number].unique())\r\n            print(f\"Team rounds: {team_rounds}\")\r\n            \r\n            # Group by round_number for proper match identification\r\n            team_matches = team_data.groupby(Columns.round_number)\r\n            opponent_matches = opponent_data.groupby(Columns.round_number)",

Debug: Print unique combinations\r\n            print(f\"Team data unique combinations: {team_data[[Columns.round_number, Columns.match_number]].drop_duplicates().values.tolist()}\")\r\n            print(f\"Opponent data unique combinations: {opponent_data[[Columns.round_number, Columns.match_number]].drop_duplicates().values.tolist()}\")\r\n            \r\n            # Get unique round numbers (matches) for the team\r\n            team_rounds = sorted(team_data[Columns.round_number].unique())\r\n            print(f\"Team rounds: {team_rounds}\")\r\n            \r\n            #         "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_league_table_simple(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, include_history: bool = False) -\u003e TableData:\n\r\n            ...\n\r\n            for i, team in enumerate(sorted_teams, 1):\r\n                team_info = team_data[team]\r\n                \r\n                # Calculate season average (only from individual player data up to selected week)\r\n                team_season_individual = individual_data[individual_data[Columns.team_name] == team]\r\n                team_individual_until_week = team_season_individual[team_season_individual[Columns.week] \u003c= week]\r\n                season_avg = team_info['season_score'] / len(team_individual_until_week) if len(team_individual_until_week) \u003e 0 else 0\r\n                \r\n                # Start with position and team name\r\n                row = [i, team]\r\n                \r\n                # Add weekly data\r\n                for w in weeks_to_show:\r\n                    week_info = team_info['weekly_data'][w]\r\n                    row.extend([\r\n                        week_info['score'],\r\n                        week_info['points'],\r\n                        week_info['avg']\r\n                    ])\r\n                \r\n                # Add season totals\r\n                row.extend([\r\n                    team_info['season_score'],\r\n                    team_info['season_points'],\r\n                    round(season_avg, 1)\r\n                ])\r\n                \r\n                data.append(row)\r\n            \r\n            # Create and return the TableData\r\n            if include_history:\r\n                title = f\"{league} {i18n_service.get_text('league_history')} - {season}\"\r\n                description = f\"{i18n_service.get_text('through_week')} {week}\"\r\n            else:\r\n                title = f\"{league} {i18n_service.get_text('league_standings')} - {season}\"\r\n                description = f\"{i18n_service.get_text('week_results')}\"",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function handleWeekTeamSelection() {\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedWeek) url.searchParams.set('week', selectedWeek);\r\n    if (selectedTeam) url.searchParams.set('team', selectedTeam);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n        \r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n\r\n        \r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        }\r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 825

        ],
        "originalContents": "function handleWeekTeamSelection() {\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedWeek) url.searchParams.set('week', selectedWeek);\r\n    if (selectedTeam) url.searchParams.set('team', selectedTeam);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n        \r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n\r\n        \r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        }\r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 825
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 796
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/league/stats.html"
      },
      "score": 0.3745116889476776
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_league_week_table(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, depth: int = 1) -\u003e TableData:\n\r\n        ...\n\r\n        for team in team_performances:\r\n            # Create a map of week to performance for easy lookup\r\n            week_to_perf = {p.week: p for p in team.weekly_performances}\r\n            \r\n            # Start with position and team name\r\n            row = [team.position, team.team_name]\r\n            \r\n            # Add weekly data\r\n            for w in range(start_week, week + 1):\r\n                perf = week_to_perf.get(w)\r\n                if perf:\r\n                    # Calculate average using players_per_team\r\n                    weekly_avg = perf.score / perf.players_per_team\r\n                    row.extend([perf.score / 2.0, perf.points, round(weekly_avg / 10.0, 1)])\r\n                else:\r\n                    row.extend([0, 0, 0])  # No data for this week\r\n            \r\n            # @todo: this is a hack to normalize the score, the factor 2.0 amd 10.0 is arbitrary, fix it in the structure\r\n            # Add season totals\r\n            row.extend([\r\n                team.total_score / 2.0,\r\n                team.total_points,\r\n                team.average / 10.0\r\n            ])\r\n            \r\n            data.append(row)\r\n        \r\n        # Create and return the TableData with configuration\r\n        return TableData(\r\n            columns=columns,\r\n            data=data,\r\n            title=f\"{league} Standings - {season}\",\r\n            description=f\"Through Week {week}\",\r\n            config={\r\n                \"stickyHeader\": True,  # Make header sticky\r\n                \"striped\": True,       # Use striped rows\r\n                \"hover\": True,         # Enable hover effect\r\n                \"responsive\": True,    # Make table responsive\r\n                \"compact\": False       # Use normal spacing\r\n            }\r\n        )",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "class LeagueService:"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 144.5,

          {
            "lineNumber": 258,
            "text": "                team.average / 10.0\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 259,
            "text": "            ])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 260,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 261,
            "text": "            data.append(row)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 262,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 263,
            "text": "        # Create and return the TableData with configuration\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 264,
            "text": "        return TableData(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 265,
            "text": "            columns=columns,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 266,
            "text": "            data=data,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 267,
            "text": "            title=f\"{league} Standings - {season}\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 268,
            "text": "            description=f\"Through Week {week}\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 269,
            "text": "            config={\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 270,
            "text": "                \"stickyHeader\": True,  # Make header sticky\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 271,
            "text": "                \"striped\": True,       # Use striped rows\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 272,
            "text": "                \"hover\": True,         # Enable hover effect\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 273,
            "text": "                \"responsive\": True,    # Make table responsive\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 274,
            "text": "                \"compact\": False       # Use normal spacing\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 275,
            "text": "            }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 276,
            "text": "        )"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n        for team in team_performances:\r\n            # Create a map of week to performance for easy lookup\r\n            week_to_perf = {p.week: p for p in team.weekly_performances}\r\n            \r\n            # Start with position and team name\r\n            row = [team.position, team.team_name]\r\n            \r\n            # Add weekly data\r\n            for w in range(start_week, week + 1):\r\n                perf = week_to_perf.get(w)\r\n                if perf:\r\n                    # Calculate average using players_per_team\r\n                    weekly_avg = perf.score / perf.players_per_team\r\n                    row.extend([perf.score / 2.0, perf.points, round(weekly_avg / 10.0, 1)])\r\n                else:\r\n                    row.extend([0, 0, 0])  # No data for this week\r\n            \r\n            # @todo: this is a hack to normalize the score, the factor 2.0 amd 10.0 is arbitrary, fix it in the structure\r\n            # Add season totals\r\n            row.extend([\r\n                team.total_score / 2.0,\r\n                team.total_points,\r\n                team.average / 10.0\r\n            ])\r\n            \r\n            data.append(row)\r\n        \r\n        # Create and return the TableData with configuration\r\n        return TableData(\r\n            columns=columns,\r\n            data=data,\r\n            title=f\"{league} Standings - {season}\",\r\n            description=f\"Through Week {week}\",\r\n            config={\r\n                \"stickyHeader\": True,  # Make header sticky\r\n                \"striped\": True,       # Use striped rows\r\n                \"hover\": True,         # Enable hover effect\r\n                \"responsive\": True,    # Make table responsive\r\n                \"compact\": False       # Use normal spacing\r\n            }\r\n        )",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 10,
            "line": 276
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 18,
            "line": 235
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/services/league_service.py"
      },
      "score": 0.3730469048023224
    }
  ],
  "prHydrationTimedOut": false
}

        "originalContents": "from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass Columns:\r\n    season: str = 'Season'\r\n    week: str = 'Week'\r\n    date: str = 'Date'\r\n    league_name: str = 'League'\r\n    players_per_team: str = 'Players per Team'\r\n    location: str = 'Location'\r\n    round_number: str = 'Round Number'\r\n    match_number: str = 'Match Number'\r\n    team_name: str = 'Team'\r\n    position: str = 'Position'\r\n    player_name: str = 'Player'\r\n    player_id: str = 'Player ID'\r\n    team_name_opponent: str = 'Opponent'\r\n    score: str = 'Score'\r\n    points: str = 'Points'\r\n    input_data: str = 'Input Data'\r\n    computed_data: str = 'Computed Data'\r\n\r\n    def __str__(self):\r\n        return str(self.get_column_names())\r\n\r\n    def get_column_names(self, selection=None):\r\n        if selection is None:\r\n            return [self.season, self.week, self.date, self.league_name, self.players_per_team, self.location, self.round_number, \r\n                    self.match_number, self.team_name, self.position, self.player_name, self.player_id, self.team_name_opponent,\r\n                    self.score, self.points, self.input_data, self.computed_data]",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n\r\n        ...\n\r\n\r\n        team_opponent_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: True\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        columns_team = [Columns.score, Columns.points, Columns.team_name, Columns.team_name_opponent, Columns.week]\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n        team_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=columns_team,\r\n            filters_eq=team_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"team_data: \\n\" + str(team_data))\r\n        \r\n\r\n        team_opponent_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=columns_team,\r\n            filters_eq=team_opponent_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"team_opponent_data: \\n\" + str(team_opponent_data))\r\n\r\n        # Get number of games\r\n        n_games = len(player_data[Columns.team_name_opponent].unique())\r\n        \r\n        # Prepare player rows\r\n        rows = []\r\n        # Group by player to get their games\r\n        player_groups = player_data.groupby(Columns.player_name)\r\n        player_groups = sorted(player_groups, key=lambda x: x[1][Columns.position].iloc[0])",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\r\n        \"\"\"Get detailed team results for a specific week including individual and team stats\"\"\"\r\n        \r\n        # Get individual player results\r\n        player_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: False\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        player_opponent_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: False\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        player_columns = [\r\n            Columns.player_name,\r\n            Columns.score,\r\n            Columns.points,\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent,\r\n            Columns.match_number,\r\n            Columns.position, \r\n            Columns.week\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        player_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=player_columns,\r\n            filters_eq=player_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"player_data: \\n\" + str(player_data))\r\n        \r\n        player_opponent_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(\r\n            columns=player_columns,\r\n            filters_eq=player_opponent_filters\r\n        )\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(\"player_opponent_data: \\n\" + str(player_opponent_data))\r\n\r\n        # Get team results\r\n        team_filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: league_name,\r\n            Columns.season: season,\r\n            Columns.team_name: team_name,\r\n            Columns.week: week,\r\n            Columns.computed_data: True\r\n        }",

            "column": 27,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n\r\n        ...\n\r\n\r\n        # Add team totals\r\n        team_row.update({\r\n            'Points_Total': float(round(team_data[Columns.points].sum(), 1)),\r\n            'Score_Total': int(team_data[Columns.score].sum()),\r\n            'Score_Average': float(round(player_data[Columns.score].mean(), 2)) if not np.isnan(team_data[Columns.score].mean()) else 0\r\n        })\r\n\r\n        # Add opponent totals\r\n        opponent_row.update({\r\n            'Points_Total': float(round(team_opponent_data[Columns.points].sum(), 1)),\r\n            'Score_Total': int(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].sum()),\r\n            'Score_Average': float(round(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].mean(), 2)) if not np.isnan(team_opponent_data[Columns.score].mean()) else 0\r\n        })\r\n        \r\n        rows.append(team_row)\r\n        rows.append(opponent_row)\r\n\r\n        # Prepare header groups for the table\r\n        header_groups = [\r\n            { 'title': 'Player', 'colspan': 2 }\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        # Add game columns\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            header_groups.append({ \r\n                'title': f'Game {game_idx}', \r\n                'colspan': 2 \r\n            })\r\n        \r\n        # Add totals column\r\n        header_groups.append({ \r\n            'title': 'Total', \r\n            'colspan': 3 \r\n        })\r\n\r\n        # Create columns based on number of games\r\n        columns = [\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Position',\r\n                'title': 'Pos',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Name',\r\n                'title': 'Name',\r\n                'className': 'text-start'\r\n            }\r\n        ]",
        "detailedLines": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef assign_points(match_df, team, opponent_team):\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    Assign points to teams based on their scores.\r\n\r\n    Args:\r\n        match_df (pd.DataFrame): The full DataFrame containing match data.\r\n        team (str): The name of the team.\r\n        opponent_team (str): The name of the opponent team.\r\n        Columns (object): An object or namespace containing column names.\r\n\r\n    Returns:\r\n        None: The function updates the 'points' column in-place.\r\n    \"\"\"\r\n    print(f\"{team} : {opponent_team}\")\r\n    \r\n    # Slice the DataFrame for both teams\r\n    results_team = match_df[\r\n        (match_df[Columns.team_name] == team) \u0026 \r\n        (match_df[Columns.team_name_opponent] == opponent_team)\r\n    ].copy()\r\n    \r\n    results_opponent = match_df[\r\n        (match_df[Columns.team_name] == opponent_team) \u0026 \r\n        (match_df[Columns.team_name_opponent] == team)\r\n    ].copy()\r\n    \r\n    # Print scores for debugging\r\n    print(\"Team Scores:\")\r\n    print(results_team[Columns.score])\r\n    print(\"Opponent Scores:\")\r\n    print(results_opponent[Columns.score])\r\n    \r\n    # Ensure both DataFrames have the same number of rows\r\n    if len(results_team) != len(results_opponent):\r\n        raise ValueError(\"Mismatch in the number of matches between team and opponent.\")\r\n    \r\n    # Convert scores to NumPy arrays for element-wise comparison\r\n    team_scores = results_team[Columns.score].to_numpy()\r\n    opponent_scores = results_opponent[Columns.score].to_numpy()\r\n    \r\n    # Perform comparisons\r\n    team_wins = team_scores \u003e opponent_scores\r\n    opponent_wins = team_scores \u003c opponent_scores\r\n    ties = team_scores == opponent_scores\r\n    \r\n    # Debug prints for comparison masks\r\n    print(\"Team Wins Mask:\")\r\n    print(team_wins)\r\n    print(\"Opponent Wins Mask:\")\r\n    print(opponent_wins)\r\n    print(\"Ties Mask:\")\r\n    print(ties)\r\n    \r\n    # Assign points based on comparisons\r\n    results_team.loc[:, Columns.points] = np.where(team_wins, 1.0, np.where(ties, 0.5, 0.0))",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef fetch_match(data, team, match_number):\r\n    return data[(\r\n                        (data[Columns.team_name] == team)\r\n                        | (data[Columns.team_name_opponent] == team)\r\n                )\r\n                \u0026 (data[Columns.match_number] == match_number)]",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\ndef fetch_match(data, team, match_number):\r\n    return data[(\r\n                        (data[Columns.team_name] == team)\r\n                        | (data[Columns.team_name_opponent] == team)\r\n                )\r\n                \u0026 (data[Columns.match_number] == match_number)]",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        for player_name, player_games in player_groups:\r\n            player_row = {\r\n                'type': 'player',\r\n                'Position': int(player_games[Columns.position].iloc[0]),  # Get player's position\r\n                'Name': player_name\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            # Add each game's scores and points\r\n            for game_idx, (_, game) in enumerate(player_games.iterrows(), 1):\r\n                player_row[f'Score_{game_idx}'] = int(game[Columns.score])\r\n                player_row[f'Points_{game_idx}'] = float(round(game[Columns.points], 1))\r\n                \r\n            # Add totals\r\n\r\n            player_row.update({\r\n                'Points_Total': float(round(player_games[Columns.points].sum(), 1)),\r\n                'Score_Total': int(player_games[Columns.score].sum()),\r\n                'Score_Average': float(round(player_games[Columns.score].mean(), 2)) if not np.isnan(player_games[Columns.score].mean()) else 0\r\n            })\r\n            \r\n            rows.append(player_row)\r\n        \r\n        # Add team row\r\n        team_row = {\r\n            'type': 'team',\r\n            'Position': '-',\r\n            'Name': team_name\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        opponent_row = {\r\n            'type': 'opponent',\r\n            'Position': '-',\r\n            'Name': 'Opponents'\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        #       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    def get_team_season(self, team_name: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a team's results in a given season.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            team_name (str): The name of the team.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The team's results for the given season.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns_to_fetch = [Columns.team_name, Columns.points, Columns.score, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': team_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        league_season_data = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns_to_fetch, filters=filters)\r\n        \r\n        return league_season_data",

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"Get head-to-head comparison table data for a team vs their opponents in a specific week\"\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            # Get all matches for the team in this week\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            if team_data.empty:\r\n                return TableData(\r\n                    columns=[],\r\n                    data=[],\r\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get all matches for the opponent teams in this week\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            opponent_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_filters)",
