        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"Get head-to-head comparison table data for a team vs their opponents in a specific week\"\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            # Get all matches for the team in this week\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            if team_data.empty:\r\n                return TableData(\r\n                    columns=[],\r\n                    data=[],\r\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get all matches for the opponent teams in this week\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            opponent_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_filters)",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_games_for_player(self, player_name: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get all games for a player\"\"\"\r\n        player_filters = {\r\n            Columns.player_name: {\r\n                'value': player_name,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        columns = [Columns.player_id, Columns.player_name, Columns.date, Columns.week, Columns.season, Columns.league_name, Columns.team_name, Columns.score, Columns.points]\r\n        return self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=player_filters)\r\n\r\n    def get_special_matches(self, team_name: str=None, amount: int=3):\r\n\r\n        columns = [Columns.week, Columns.season, Columns.league_name, Columns.round_number, Columns.team_name, Columns.score, Columns.points, Columns.team_name_opponent]\r\n        filters_team = {\r\n            Columns.team_name: {\r\n                'value': team_name,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            },\r\n            Columns.computed_data: {\r\n                'value': True,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        filters_opponent = {\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent: {\r\n                'value': team_name,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            },\r\n            Columns.computed_data: {\r\n                'value': True,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        data_team = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters_team)\r\n        data_opponent = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters_opponent)\r\n\r\n        # merge data_team and data_opponent\r\n        data_combined = pd.concat([data_team, data_opponent])\r\n        data_matches = data_combined.groupby([Columns.season, Columns.week, Columns.round_number])\r\n        \r\n        \r\n        # determin win margins\r\n        data_team[ColumnsExtra.margin] = int(0)",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_games_for_player(self, player_name: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get all games for a player\"\"\"\r\n        player_filters = {\r\n            Columns.player_name: {\r\n                'value': player_name,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        columns = [Columns.player_id, Columns.player_name, Columns.date, Columns.week, Columns.season, Columns.league_name, Columns.team_name, Columns.score, Columns.points]\r\n        return self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=player_filters)\r\n\r\n    def get_special_matches(self, team_name: str=None, amount: int=3):\r\n\r\n        columns = [Columns.week, Columns.season, Columns.league_name, Columns.round_number, Columns.team_name, Columns.score, Columns.points, Columns.team_name_opponent]\r\n        filters_team = {\r\n            Columns.team_name: {\r\n                'value': team_name,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            },\r\n            Columns.computed_data: {\r\n                'value': True,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        filters_opponent = {\r\n            Columns.team_name_opponent: {\r\n                'value': team_name,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            },\r\n            Columns.computed_data: {\r\n                'value': True,\r\n                'operator': 'eq'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        data_team = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters_team)\r\n        data_opponent = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters_opponent)\r\n\r\n        # merge data_team and data_opponent\r\n        data_combined = pd.concat([data_team, data_opponent])\r\n        data_matches = data_combined.groupby([Columns.season, Columns.week, Columns.round_number])\r\n        \r\n        \r\n        # determin win margins\r\n        data_team[ColumnsExtra.margin] = int(0)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "def calculate_points(df):\n\r\n                    ...\n\r\n                    #results_team[Columns.points] += 1 if results_team[Columns.score].gt(results_opponent[Columns.score]) else 0\r\n                    #results_team[Columns.points] += 0.5 if results_team[Columns.score].eq(results_opponent[Columns.score]) else 0\r\n                    #results_opponent[Columns.points] = 1 - results_team[Columns.points]\r\n                    \r\n                    if False:\r\n                    \r\n                        print(team + \" : \" + opponent_team)\r\n                        results_team = match_df[(match_df[Columns.team_name] == team) \u0026 \r\n                                            (match_df[Columns.team_name_opponent] == opponent_team)]\r\n                        results_opponent = match_df[(match_df[Columns.team_name] == opponent_team) \u0026 \r\n                                                (match_df[Columns.team_name_opponent] == team)]\r\n\r\n                        # Reset indices for comparison\r\n                        results_team_scores = results_team[Columns.score].reset_index(drop=True)\r\n                        results_opponent_scores = results_opponent[Columns.score].reset_index(drop=True)\r\n\r\n                        # Compare aligned scores\r\n                        team_wins = results_team_scores.gt(results_opponent_scores)\r\n                        opponent_wins = results_opponent_scores.gt(results_team_scores)\r\n                        ties = results_team_scores.eq(results_opponent_scores)\r\n\r\n                        # Update points using original indices\r\n                        results_team.loc[results_team.index[team_wins], Columns.points] = 1.0\r\n                        results_opponent.loc[results_opponent.index[opponent_wins], Columns.points] = 1.0\r\n                        results_team.loc[results_team.index[ties], Columns.points] = 0.5\r\n                        results_opponent.loc[results_opponent.index[ties], Columns.points] = 0.5\r\n                        print(results_team)\r\n                        print(results_opponent)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "def calculate_points(df):\n\r\n            ...\n\r\n            # iterate over all teams\r\n            for team in all_teams:\r\n                for opponent_team in all_teams:\r\n                    if team == opponent_team:\r\n                        continue\r\n                    print(match_df)\r\n\r\n                    match_df = assign_points(match_df, team, opponent_team)\r\n\r\n\r\n                    if False:\r\n                        print(team + \" : \" + opponent_team)\r\n                        results_team = match_df[(match_df[Columns.team_name] == team) \u0026 (match_df[Columns.team_name_opponent] == opponent_team)]\r\n                        results_opponent = match_df[(match_df[Columns.team_name] == opponent_team) \u0026 (match_df[Columns.team_name_opponent] == team)]\r\n                        print(results_team[Columns.score])\r\n                        print(results_opponent[Columns.score])\r\n                        print (results_team[Columns.score].gt(results_opponent[Columns.score]))\r\n                        print (results_opponent[Columns.score].gt(results_team[Columns.score]))\r\n                        results_team.loc[results_team[Columns.score].gt(results_opponent[Columns.score]), Columns.points] = 1.0\r\n                        results_opponent.loc[results_opponent[Columns.score].gt(results_team[Columns.score]), Columns.points] = 1.0\r\n\r\n                        # Handle ties using index-aligned comparison\r\n                        ties = results_team[Columns.score].eq(results_opponent[Columns.score])\r\n                        results_team.loc[ties, Columns.points] = 0.5\r\n                        results_opponent.loc[ties, Columns.points] = 0.5",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n\r\n    \r\n    ...\n\r\n    \r\n    def get_player_season(self, player_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a player's results in a given season.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            player_name (str): The name of the player.\r\n            season (str): The season.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The player's results for the given season.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns = [Columns.team_name, Columns.player_name, Columns.points, Columns.score, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters_player = {\r\n            Columns.player_name: {'value': player_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        filters_team = {\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': player_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        data_player = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters_player)\r\n        data_team = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters_team)\r\n        \r\n        return pd.concat([data_player, data_team])",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "\r\n    \r\n    def get_player_season(self, player_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a player's results in a given season.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            player_name (str): The name of the player.\r\n            season (str): The season.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The player's results for the given season.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns = [Columns.team_name, Columns.player_name, Columns.points, Columns.score, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters_player = {\r\n            Columns.player_name: {'value': player_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        filters_team = {\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': player_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        data_player = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters_player)\r\n        data_team = self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters_team)\r\n        \r\n        return pd.concat([data_player, data_team])",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "def calculate_point3(df):\n    \r\n\r\n            ...\n    \r\n\r\n            for position in team_positions:\r\n                score_team = team_data[Columns.score].values[position]\r\n                score_opponent = opponent_data[Columns.score].values[position]\r\n\r\n                score_team_total += score_team\r\n                score_opponent_total += score_opponent\r\n\r\n                condition_team = (match_df[Columns.team_name] == team_name) \u0026 (match_df[Columns.position] == position)\r\n                condition_opponent = (match_df[Columns.team_name] == opponent_name) \u0026 (match_df[Columns.position] == position)\r\n\r\n                if score_team \u003e score_opponent:\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_team, Columns.points] = 1.0\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_opponent, Columns.points] = 0.0\r\n                elif score_team \u003c score_opponent:\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_team, Columns.points] = 0.0\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_opponent, Columns.points] = 1.0\r\n                else:\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_team, Columns.points] = 0.5\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_opponent, Columns.points] = 0.5\r\n            \r\n            #print(match_df)\r\n            df_with_points.update(match_df)\r\n            #print(df_with_points.head(8))\r\n\r\n            #print(str(score_team_total) + \" : \" + str(score_opponent_total))\r\n            points_team = 0 \r\n            points_opponent = 0\r\n            if score_team_total \u003e score_opponent_total:\r\n                points_team = 2\r\n            elif score_team_total \u003c score_opponent_total:\r\n                points_opponent = 2\r\n            else:\r\n                points_team = 1\r\n                points_opponent = 1\r\n            #print(str(points_team) + \": \" + str(points_opponent)    )\r\n            \r\n            lala = 0",

        "originalContents": "    \r\n\r\n            for position in team_positions:\r\n                score_team = team_data[Columns.score].values[position]\r\n                score_opponent = opponent_data[Columns.score].values[position]\r\n\r\n                score_team_total += score_team\r\n                score_opponent_total += score_opponent\r\n\r\n                condition_team = (match_df[Columns.team_name] == team_name) \u0026 (match_df[Columns.position] == position)\r\n                condition_opponent = (match_df[Columns.team_name] == opponent_name) \u0026 (match_df[Columns.position] == position)\r\n\r\n                if score_team \u003e score_opponent:\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_team, Columns.points] = 1.0\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_opponent, Columns.points] = 0.0\r\n                elif score_team \u003c score_opponent:\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_team, Columns.points] = 0.0\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_opponent, Columns.points] = 1.0\r\n                else:\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_team, Columns.points] = 0.5\r\n                    match_df.loc[condition_opponent, Columns.points] = 0.5\r\n            \r\n            #print(match_df)\r\n            df_with_points.update(match_df)\r\n            #print(df_with_points.head(8))\r\n\r\n            #print(str(score_team_total) + \" : \" + str(score_opponent_total))\r\n            points_team = 0 \r\n            points_opponent = 0\r\n            if score_team_total \u003e score_opponent_total:\r\n                points_team = 2\r\n            elif score_team_total \u003c score_opponent_total:\r\n                points_opponent = 2\r\n            else:\r\n                points_team = 1\r\n                points_opponent = 1\r\n            #print(str(points_team) + \": \" + str(points_opponent)    )\r\n            \r\n            lala = 0",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_league_history(self, league_name: str, season: str, week: int=None, depth: int=None, debug_output:bool=False) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a team's results in a given week.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            league_name (str): The name of the league.\r\n            season (str): The season.\r\n            team_name (str): The name of the team.\r\n            week (int): The week number.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The team's results for the given week.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns = [Columns.score, Columns.points, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: {'value': league_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': team_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters)",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        High level database query.\r\n        Composes a table that represents a team's results in a given week.\r\n\r\n        Args:\r\n            league_name (str): The name of the league.\r\n            season (str): The season.\r\n            team_name (str): The name of the team.\r\n            week (int): The week number.\r\n\r\n        Returns:\r\n            pd.DataFrame: The team's results for the given week.\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        columns = [Columns.score, Columns.points, Columns.week]\r\n        \r\n        # Use the new filter format\r\n        filters = {\r\n            Columns.league_name: {'value': league_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.team_name: {'value': team_name, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n            Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        return self.data_adapter.get_filtered_data(columns=columns, filters=filters)",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each game\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            columns.extend([\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Score_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Score',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                },\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Points_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Pts',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                }\r\n            ])\r\n        \r\n        # Add total columns\r\n        columns.extend([\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Points_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Points',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Score',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Average',\r\n                'title': 'Avg',\r\n                'className': 'text-center',\r\n                'formatter': '(value || 0).toFixed(1)'\r\n            }\r\n        ])\r\n\r\n        # Create the complete table configuration matching the component's expected structure\r\n        table_config = {\r\n            'data': rows,  # The actual data rows\r\n            'columns': columns,  # Column definitions\r\n            'headerGroups': header_groups,  # Header group definitions\r\n            'rowNumbering': False,  # Disable row numbers\r\n            'positionChange': False,  # Disable position change indicators\r\n            'metadata': {  # Additional metadata\r\n                'league': league_name,\r\n                'season': season,\r\n                'week': week,\r\n                'location': 'TBD'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(table_config)\r\n        return table_config",

          },

        "originalContents": "\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each game\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            columns.extend([\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Score_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Score',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                },\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Points_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Pts',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                }\r\n            ])\r\n        \r\n        # Add total columns\r\n        columns.extend([\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Points_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Points',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Score',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Average',\r\n                'title': 'Avg',\r\n                'className': 'text-center',\r\n                'formatter': '(value || 0).toFixed(1)'\r\n            }\r\n        ])\r\n\r\n        # Create the complete table configuration matching the component's expected structure\r\n        table_config = {\r\n            'data': rows,  # The actual data rows\r\n            'columns': columns,  # Column definitions\r\n            'headerGroups': header_groups,  # Header group definitions\r\n            'rowNumbering': False,  # Disable row numbers\r\n            'positionChange': False,  # Disable position change indicators\r\n            'metadata': {  # Additional metadata\r\n                'league': league_name,\r\n                'season': season,\r\n                'week': week,\r\n                'location': 'TBD'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(table_config)\r\n        return table_config",

        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TableData:\r\n    \"\"\"Complete table data structure.\"\"\"\r\n    columns: List[ColumnGroup]\r\n    data: List[List[Any]]\r\n    title: Optional[str] = None\r\n    description: Optional[str] = None\r\n    config: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Table-wide configuration\r\n    metadata: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = field(default_factory=dict)  # Additional metadata for i18n and UI\r\n    \r\n    def to_dict(self) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Convert to a dictionary suitable for JSON serialization\"\"\"\r\n        return {\r\n            \"columns\": [\r\n                {\r\n                    \"title\": group.title,\r\n                    \"columns\": [\r\n                        {\r\n                            \"title\": col.title, \r\n                            \"field\": col.field,\r\n                            **({\"sortable\": col.sortable} if col.sortable is not None else {}),\r\n                            **({\"filterable\": col.filterable} if col.filterable is not None else {}),\r\n                            **({\"width\": col.width} if col.width else {}),\r\n                            **({\"align\": col.align} if col.align else {}),\r\n                            **({\"format\": col.format} if col.format else {}),\r\n                            **({\"style\": col.style} if col.style else {})\r\n                        } \r\n                        for col in group.columns\r\n                    ],\r\n                    **({\"frozen\": group.frozen} if group.frozen else {}),\r\n                    **({\"style\": group.style} if group.style else {}),\r\n                    **({\"headerStyle\": group.header_style} if group.header_style else {}),\r\n                    **({\"width\": group.width} if group.width else {})\r\n                }\r\n                for group in self.columns\r\n            ],\r\n            \"data\": self.data,\r\n            **({\"title\": self.title} if self.title else {}),\r\n            **({\"description\": self.description} if self.description else {}),",

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\n\r\n            \r\n            ...\n\r\n            \r\n            opponent_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_filters)\r\n            \r\n            # Get unique games (round_number) for this team and map to opponent names\r\n            games = sorted(player_data[Columns.round_number].unique())\r\n            \r\n            # Create a mapping of round_number to opponent team name\r\n            game_to_opponent = {}\r\n            for game in games:\r\n                game_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.round_number] == game]\r\n                if not game_data.empty:\r\n                    opponent_name = game_data[Columns.team_name_opponent].iloc[0]\r\n                    game_to_opponent[game] = opponent_name\r\n            \r\n            # Create column groups\r\n            columns = [\r\n                ColumnGroup(\r\n                    title=\"Player\",\r\n                    frozen=\"left\",\r\n                    style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#f8f9fa\"},\r\n                    columns=[\r\n                        Column(title=\"Pos\", field=\"position\", width=\"50px\", align=\"center\"),\r\n                        Column(title=\"Name\", field=\"name\", width=\"200px\", align=\"left\")\r\n                    ]\r\n                )\r\n            ]\r\n            \r\n            # Add game column groups with opponent team names\r\n            for game in games:\r\n                opponent_name = game_to_opponent.get(game, f\"Game {game}\")\r\n                columns.append(\r\n                    ColumnGroup(\r\n                        title=opponent_name,\r\n                        columns=[\r\n                            Column(title=\"Score\", field=f\"game{game}_score\", width=\"80px\", align=\"center\"),\r\n                            Column(title=\"Pts\", field=f\"game{game}_points\", width=\"60px\", align=\"center\")\r\n                        ]\r\n                    )\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Add totals column group\r\n            columns.append(\r\n                ColumnGroup(\r\n                    title=\"Total\",\r\n                    style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#e9ecef\"},\r\n                    header_style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"},\r\n                    c",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_league_week_table(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, depth: int = 1) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Get a formatted table for league standings with weekly breakdowns.\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            season: The season identifier\r\n            league: The league name\r\n            week: The current week (if None, gets the latest)\r\n            depth: How many previous weeks to include\r\n            \r\n        Returns:\r\n            TableData object with the league standings\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        # If week is not specified, get the latest week\r\n        if week is None:\r\n            week = self.get_latest_week(season, league)\r\n        \r\n        # Get team performances from the adapter\r\n        team_performances = self.adapter.get_league_standings(season, league, week)\r\n        \r\n        if not team_performances:\r\n            # Return empty table structure\r\n            return TableData(\r\n                columns=[],\r\n                data=[],\r\n                title=f\"No data available for {league} - {season}\"\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Sort by total points (descending) and assign positions\r\n        team_performances.sort(key=lambda x: (x.total_points, x.total_score), reverse=True)\r\n        for i, perf in enumerate(team_performances, 1):\r\n            perf.position = i\r\n        \r\n        # Create column groups\r\n        columns = [\r\n            ColumnGroup(\r\n                title=\"Ranking\",\r\n                frozen=\"left\",  # Freeze this group to the left\r\n                style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#f8f9fa\"},  # Light gray background\r\n                columns=[\r\n                    Column(title=\"#\", field=\"pos\", width=\"50px\", align=\"center\"),\r\n                    Column(title=\"Team\", field=\"team\", width=\"200px\", align=\"left\")\r\n                ]\r\n            )\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each week\r\n        start_week = max(1, week - depth + 1)",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 142.5,
            "text": "\r\n\r\n    ..."
          },

            "lineNumber": 143,
            "text": "\r"

            "lineNumber": 144,
            "text": "\r"

            "text": "    def get_league_week_table(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, depth: int = 1) -\u003e TableData:\r"

          {

            "text": "        \"\"\"\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 147,
            "text": "        Get a formatted table for league standings with weekly breakdowns.\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 148,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {

            "text": "        Args:\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 152,

            "lineNumber": 154,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 155,
            "text": "        Returns:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 156,
            "text": "            TableData object with the league standings\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 157,
            "text": "        \"\"\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 158,
            "text": "        # If week is not specified, get the latest week\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 159,
            "text": "        if week is None:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 160,
            "text": "            week = self.get_latest_week(season, league)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 161,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 162,
            "text": "        # Get team performances from the adapter\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 163,
            "text": "        team_performances = self.adapter.get_league_standings(season, league, week)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 164,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 165,
            "text": "        if not team_performances:\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 166,
            "text": "            # Return empty table structure\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 167,
            "text": "            return TableData(\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 168,
            "text": "                columns=[],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 169,
            "text": "                data=[],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 170,
            "text": "                title=f\"No data available for {league} - {season}\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 171,
            "text": "            )\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 172,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 173,
            "text": "        # Sort by total points (descending) and assign positions\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 174,
            "text": "        team_performances.sort(key=lambda x: (x.total_points, x.total_score), reverse=True)\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 175,
            "text": "        for i, perf in enumerate(team_performances, 1):\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 176,
            "text": "            perf.position = i\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 177,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 178,
            "text": "        # Create column groups\r"
          },

            "text": "        columns = [\r"

            "lineNumber": 180,
            "text": "            ColumnGroup(\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 181,
            "text": "                title=\"Ranking\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 182,
            "text": "                frozen=\"left\",  # Freeze this group to the left\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 183,
            "text": "                style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#f8f9fa\"},  # Light gray background\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 184,

            "lineNumber": 186,

          {
            "lineNumber": 187,
            "text": "                ]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 188,
            "text": "            )\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 189,
            "text": "        ]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 190,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 191,
            "text": "        # Add columns for each week\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 192,
            "text": "        start_week = max(1, week - depth + 1)"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_league_week_table(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, depth: int = 1) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        Get a formatted table for league standings with weekly breakdowns.\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            season: The season identifier\r\n            league: The league name\r\n            week: The current week (if None, gets the latest)\r\n            depth: How many previous weeks to include\r\n            \r\n        Returns:\r\n            TableData object with the league standings\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        # If week is not specified, get the latest week\r\n        if week is None:\r\n            week = self.get_latest_week(season, league)\r\n        \r\n        # Get team performances from the adapter\r\n        team_performances = self.adapter.get_league_standings(season, league, week)\r\n        \r\n        if not team_performances:\r\n            # Return empty table structure\r\n            return TableData(\r\n                columns=[],\r\n                data=[],\r\n                title=f\"No data available for {league} - {season}\"\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Sort by total points (descending) and assign positions\r\n        team_performances.sort(key=lambda x: (x.total_points, x.total_score), reverse=True)\r\n        for i, perf in enumerate(team_performances, 1):\r\n            perf.position = i\r\n        \r\n        # Create column groups\r\n        columns = [\r\n            ColumnGroup(\r\n                title=\"Ranking\",\r\n                frozen=\"left\",  # Freeze this group to the left\r\n                style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#f8f9fa\"},  # Light gray background\r\n                columns=[\r\n                    Column(title=\"#\", field=\"pos\", width=\"50px\", align=\"center\"),\r\n                    Column(title=\"Team\", field=\"team\", width=\"200px\", align=\"left\")\r\n                ]\r\n            )\r\n        ]\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each week\r\n        start_week = max(1, week - depth + 1)",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 46,
            "line": 192
          },

            "column": 17,
            "line": 143
          }
        },

        "originalContents": "\r\n        for w in range(start_week, week + 1):\r\n            columns.append(\r\n                ColumnGroup(\r\n                    title=f\"Week {w}\",\r\n                    columns=[\r\n                        Column(title=\"Pins\", field=f\"week{w}_score\", format=\"{:,}\"),\r\n                        Column(title=\"Pts.\", field=f\"week{w}_points\", format=\"{:.1f}\"),\r\n                        Column(title=\"Avg.\", field=f\"week{w}_avg\", format=\"{:.1f}\")\r\n                    ]\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Add season total column with special styling\r\n        columns.append(\r\n            ColumnGroup(\r\n                title=\"Season Total\",\r\n                style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#e9ecef\"},  # Slightly darker background\r\n                header_style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"},  # Bold header\r\n                columns=[\r\n                    Column(\r\n                        title=\"Pins\", \r\n                        field=\"season_total_score\", \r\n                        format=\"{:,}\",\r\n                        style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"}\r\n                    ),\r\n                    Column(\r\n                        title=\"Pts.\", \r\n                        field=\"season_total_points\", \r\n                        format=\"{:.1f}\",\r\n                        style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"}\r\n                    ),\r\n                    Column(\r\n                        title=\"Avg.\", \r\n                        field=\"season_total_average\", \r\n                        format=\"{:.1f}\",\r\n                        style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"}\r\n                    )\r\n                ]\r\n            )\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # Prepare the data rows\r\n        data = []",

        "contents": "\r\n    // Process columns to ensure frozen properties are set and add group indices\r\n    const processedColumns = data.columns.map((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        const newColGroup = { ...colGroup };\r\n        \r\n        if (newColGroup.columns) {\r\n            newColGroup.columns = newColGroup.columns.map((subCol, subIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                const newSubCol = { ...subCol };\r\n\r\n                // Add subtle vertical lines between column groups\r\n                if (subIndex \u003c newColGroup.columns.length - 1) {\r\n                    newSubCol.cssClass = 'border-right'; // Add a class for right border\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // Set the formatter for the first column to apply color\r\n                if (subIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 groupIndex === 0) { // Assuming the first column is the position\r\n                    newSubCol.formatter = function(cell) {\r\n                        const team = cell.getRow().getData().team; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold;\"\u003e\r\n                                        ${value}\r\n                                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                    };\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                return newSubCol;\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        return newColGroup;\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Destroy existing instance if it exists\r\n    if (window[tableId + 'Instance']) {\r\n        window[tableId + 'Instance'].destroy();\r\n    }\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n    // Create table\r\n    const table = document.createElement('table');\r\n    table.className = 'table table-striped table-hover';\r\n\r\n    // Create header\r\n    const thead = document.createElement('thead');\r\n\r\n    // Add group headers\r\n    const groupHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n        const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n        th.textContent = colGroup.title || '';\r\n        th.colSpan = colGroup.columns ? colGroup.columns.length : 1;\r\n        groupHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n    });\r\n    thead.appendChild(groupHeaderRow);\r\n\r\n    // Add sub-headers\r\n    const subHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n        if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n            colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n                th.textContent = col.title || '';\r\n                // Add subtle vertical lines between column groups\r\n                if (index \u003c colGroup.columns.length - 1) {\r\n                    th.style.borderRight = '1px solid #dee2e6'; // Bootstrap's default border color\r\n                }\r\n                subHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n    thead.appendChild(subHeaderRow);\r\n    \r\n    table.appendChild(thead);\r\n\r\n    // Create body\r\n    const tbody = document.createElement('tbody');\r\n\r\n    // Add rows\r\n    transformedData.forEach(rowData =\u003e {\r\n        const tr = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n            if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                    const td = document.createElement('td');\r\n                    td.textContent = rowData[col.field] || ''; // Use the transformed data\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003clink href=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/css/tabulator.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/js/tabulator.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nfunction createTable(config) {\r\n    const {\r\n        data,\r\n        columns,\r\n        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r\n        rowNumbering = true,\r\n        positionChange = false\r\n    } = config;\r\n\r\n    let currentData = [...data];\r\n\r\n    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r\n    const getGroupColors = () =\u003e {\r\n        const endColor = '#7ec2f8';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n        const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n        const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n        \r\n        return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n            if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n            if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n            \r\n            const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n            const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n            const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n            const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n        });\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n        hex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');\r\n        const bigint = parseInt(hex, 16);\r\n        const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n        const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n        const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n        return [r, g, b];\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const colors = getGroupColors();\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003clink href=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/css/tabulator.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r"

            "text": "\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/js/tabulator.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r"

            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "function createTable(config) {\r"

            "text": "    const {\r"

            "text": "        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r"

            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        rowNumbering = true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    } = config;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    let currentData = [...data];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    const getGroupColors = () =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        const endColor = '#7ec2f8';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "            const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    const hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        hex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        const bigint = parseInt(hex, 16);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        return [r, g, b];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    const colors = getGroupColors();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\u003clink href=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/css/tabulator.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/js/tabulator.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nfunction createTable(config) {\r\n    const {\r\n        data,\r\n        columns,\r\n        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r\n        rowNumbering = true,\r\n        positionChange = false\r\n    } = config;\r\n\r\n    let currentData = [...data];\r\n\r\n    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r\n    const getGroupColors = () =\u003e {\r\n        const endColor = '#7ec2f8';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n        const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n        const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n        \r\n        return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n            if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n            if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n            \r\n            const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n            const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n            const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n            const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n        });\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n        hex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');\r\n        const bigint = parseInt(hex, 16);\r\n        const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n        const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n        const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n        return [r, g, b];\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const colors = getGroupColors();\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n            colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n                th.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                th.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                th.className = 'align-middle';\r\n                \r\n                // Apply column width\r\n                if (col.width) {\r\n                    th.style.width = col.width;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Apply group styles to column headers\r\n                if (colGroup.style) {\r\n                    Object.entries(colGroup.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                        th.style[key] = value;\r\n                    });\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Make sortable if specified\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n            colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n                th.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                th.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                th.className = 'align-middle';\r\n                \r\n                // Apply column width\r\n                if (col.width) {\r\n                    th.style.width = col.width;\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Apply group styles to column headers\r\n                if (colGroup.style) {\r\n                    Object.entries(colGroup.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                        th.style[key] = value;\r\n                    });\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                // Make sortable if specified\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const getGroupColors = (headerGroups) =\u003e {\r\n    const endColor = '#2196F3';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n    const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n    const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n    \r\n    return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n        if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n        if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n        \r\n        const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n        const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n        const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n        const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n    });\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction createTableTabulator(tableId, data) {\r\n    // Check if the data has columns and data\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.error('Invalid data format');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Transform the data from array format to object format\r\n    const transformedData = data.data.map(row =\u003e {\r\n        const obj = {};\r\n        let index = 0; // Initialize index to track the position in the row array\r\n\r\n        // Loop through each column group\r\n        data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n            if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                // Loop through each column in the group\r\n                colGroup.columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    obj[col.field] = row[index]; // Assign the value from the row to the object\r\n                    index++; // Increment index for the next field\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        return obj; // Return the transformed object\r\n    });\r\n",

        "originalContents": "const getGroupColors = (headerGroups) =\u003e {\r\n    const endColor = '#2196F3';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n    const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n    const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n    \r\n    return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n        if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n        if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n        \r\n        const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n        const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n        const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n        const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n    });\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction createTableTabulator(tableId, data) {\r\n    // Check if the data has columns and data\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.error('Invalid data format');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Transform the data from array format to object format\r\n    const transformedData = data.data.map(row =\u003e {\r\n        const obj = {};\r\n        let index = 0; // Initialize index to track the position in the row array\r\n\r\n        // Loop through each column group\r\n        data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n            if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                // Loop through each column in the group\r\n                colGroup.columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    obj[col.field] = row[index]; // Assign the value from the row to the object\r\n                    index++; // Increment index for the next field\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        return obj; // Return the transformed object\r\n    });\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Create new Tabulator instance\r\n    window[tableId + 'Instance'] = new Tabulator(&#96;#${tableId}&#96;, {\r\n        data: transformedData,\r\n        columns: processedColumns,\r\n        layout: \"fitDataStretch\",\r\n        responsiveLayout: false,\r\n        pagination: false,\r\n        movableColumns: false,\r\n        tooltips: false,\r\n        height: \"auto\",\r\n        rowHeight: 40,\r\n        theme: \"bootstrap\",\r\n        cssClass: \"custom-tabulator\",\r\n        columnHeaderVertAlign: \"middle\",\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    console.log(&#96;Table \"${tableId}\" successfully created/updated&#96;);\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction createTableBootstrap(containerId, tableData, columns = null, groupBy = null) {\r\n    console.log('Creating Bootstrap table with:', {\r\n        containerId,\r\n        tableData,\r\n        columns,\r\n        groupBy\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Parse tableData if it's a string\r\n    if (typeof tableData === 'string') {\r\n        try {\r\n            tableData = JSON.parse(tableData);\r\n        } catch (e) {\r\n            console.error('Failed to parse data:', e);\r\n            return;\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Extract columns and data from tableData if they exist\r\n    if (tableData.columns \u0026\u0026 tableData.data) {\r\n        columns = tableData.columns;\r\n        tableData = tableData.data;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    console.log('Processed data:', {\r\n        columns,\r\n        tableData\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Check if all required parameters are present\r\n    if (!containerId || !tableData || !columns) {\r\n        console.error('Missing required parameters:', { containerId, tableData, columns });\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n    if (!container) {\r\n        console.error('Container not found:', containerId);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Clear existing content\r\n    container.innerHTML = '';\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass Columns:\r\n    season: str = 'Season'\r\n    week: str = 'Week'\r\n    date: str = 'Date'\r\n    league_name: str = 'League'\r\n    players_per_team: str = 'Players per Team'\r\n    location: str = 'Location'\r\n    round_number: str = 'Round Number'\r\n    match_number: str = 'Match Number'\r\n    team_name: str = 'Team'\r\n    position: str = 'Position'\r\n    player_name: str = 'Player'\r\n    player_id: str = 'Player ID'\r\n    team_name_opponent: str = 'Opponent'\r\n    score: str = 'Score'\r\n    points: str = 'Points'\r\n    input_data: str = 'Input Data'\r\n    computed_data: str = 'Computed Data'\r\n\r\n    def __str__(self):\r\n        return str(self.get_column_names())\r\n\r\n    def get_column_names(self, selection=None):\r\n        if selection is None:\r\n            return [self.season, self.week, self.date, self.league_name, self.players_per_team, self.location, self.round_number, \r\n                    self.match_number, self.team_name, self.position, self.player_name, self.player_id, self.team_name_opponent,\r\n                    self.score, self.points, self.input_data, self.computed_data]",

        "originalContents": "from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass Columns:\r\n    season: str = 'Season'\r\n    week: str = 'Week'\r\n    date: str = 'Date'\r\n    league_name: str = 'League'\r\n    players_per_team: str = 'Players per Team'\r\n    location: str = 'Location'\r\n    round_number: str = 'Round Number'\r\n    match_number: str = 'Match Number'\r\n    team_name: str = 'Team'\r\n    position: str = 'Position'\r\n    player_name: str = 'Player'\r\n    player_id: str = 'Player ID'\r\n    team_name_opponent: str = 'Opponent'\r\n    score: str = 'Score'\r\n    points: str = 'Points'\r\n    input_data: str = 'Input Data'\r\n    computed_data: str = 'Computed Data'\r\n\r\n    def __str__(self):\r\n        return str(self.get_column_names())\r\n\r\n    def get_column_names(self, selection=None):\r\n        if selection is None:\r\n            return [self.season, self.week, self.date, self.league_name, self.players_per_team, self.location, self.round_number, \r\n                    self.match_number, self.team_name, self.position, self.player_name, self.player_id, self.team_name_opponent,\r\n                    self.score, self.points, self.input_data, self.computed_data]",

Get all unique positions across all matches\r\n            all_positions = sorted(set(team_data[Columns.position].unique()) | set(opponent_data[Columns.position].unique()))\r\n            \r\n            # Create column groups\r\n            columns = [\r\n                ColumnGroup(\r\n                    title=i18n_service.get_text(\"match_day\"),\r\n                    style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#f8f9fa\"},\r\n                    columns=[\r\n                        Column(title=i18n_service.get_text(\"round\"), field=\"round_number\", width=\"60px\", align=\"center\"),\r\n                        Column(title=i18n_service.get_text(\"opponent\"), field=\"opponent_name\", width=\"120px\", align=\"left\"),\r\n                        Column(title=i18n_service.get_text(\"points\"), field=\"total_points\", width=\"80px\", align=\"center\")\r\n                    ]\r\n                )\r\n            ]\r\n            \r\n            # Add position column groups for each position\r\n            for position in all_positions:\r\n                columns.append(\r\n                    ColumnGroup(\r\n                        title=f\"Position {int(position+1)}\",\r\n                        columns=[\r\n                            Column(title=i18n_service.get_text(\"name\"), field=f\"pos{position}_name\", width=\"150px\", align=\"left\"),\r\n                            Column(title=i18n_service.get_text(\"score\"), field=f\"pos{position}_score\", width=\"80px\", align=\"center\"),\r\n                            Column(title=i18n_service.get_text(\"points\"), field=f\"pos{position}_points\", width=\"80px\", align=\"center\")\r\n                        ]\r\n                    )\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Add team column group\r\n            columns.append(",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Create table wrapper for horizontal scroll\r\n    const tableWrapper = document.createElement('div');\r\n    tableWrapper.className = 'table-responsive';\r\n    \r\n    const table = document.createElement('table');\r\n    table.className = 'table table-striped table-hover';\r\n    \r\n    // Create header\r\n    const thead = document.createElement('thead');\r\n    const headerRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    \r\n    // Handle column groups if present\r\n    if (columns[0] \u0026\u0026 columns[0].children) {\r\n        // Add group headers\r\n        const groupHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        columns.forEach(group =\u003e {\r\n            const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n            th.textContent = group.title || '';\r\n            th.colSpan = group.children ? group.children.length : 1;\r\n            groupHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(groupHeaderRow);\r\n\r\n        // Add sub-headers\r\n        const subHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        columns.forEach(group =\u003e {\r\n            if (group.children) {\r\n                group.children.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n                    th.textContent = col.title || '';\r\n                    if (col.width) {\r\n                        th.style.minWidth = col.width;\r\n                    }\r\n                    subHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(subHeaderRow);\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Simple columns without groups\r\n        columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n            const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n            th.textContent = col.title || '';\r\n            if (col.width) {\r\n                th.style.minWidth = col.width;\r\n            }\r\n            headerRow.appendChild(th);\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(headerRow);\r\n    ",

group.children.length : 1;\r\n            groupHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(groupHeaderRow);\r\n\r\n        // Add sub-headers\r\n        const subHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        columns.forEach(group =\u003e {\r\n            if (group.children) {\r\n                group.children.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n                    th.textContent = col.title || '';\r\n                    if (col.width) {\r\n                        th.style.minWidth = col.width;\r\n                    }\r\n                    subHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(subHeaderRow);\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Simple columns without groups\r\n        columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n            const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n            th.textContent = col.title || '';\r\n            if (col.width) {\r\n                th.style.minWidth = col.width;\r\n            }\r\n            headerRow.appendChild(th);\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(headerRow);\r\n    ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "from typing import List\r\n\r\n\r\nclass DataDict:\r\n    def __init__(self):\r\n        self.data = {}\r\n\r\n    def transform_dict(self, data_dict):\r\n        self.data = {\r\n            'headerGroups': [\r\n                {'title': group[0], 'colspan': group[1]} \r\n                for group in data_dict['headerGroups']\r\n            ],\r\n            'columns': [\r\n                {'title': col, 'key': str(i), 'sortable': False} \r\n                for i, col in enumerate(data_dict['columns'])\r\n            ],\r\n            'data': [\r\n                {str(i): value for i, value in enumerate(row)}\r\n                for row in data_dict['data']\r\n            ],\r\n            'rowNumbering': True\r\n        }\r\n        return self\r\n\r\n    def add_data(self, key, value):\r\n        self.data[key] = value\r\n\r\n    def make_sortable(self, columns_to_make_sortable):\r\n        \r\n        if not isinstance(columns_to_make_sortable, list):\r\n            columns_to_make_sortable = [columns_to_make_sortable]\r\n\r\n        for column in columns_to_make_sortable:\r\n            if isinstance(column, str):\r\n                print(\"make_sortable: need to find column : \" + str(column))\r\n                print(\"make_sortable: NOT IMPLEMENTED\")\r\n                \r\n            if isinstance(column, int):\r\n                #print(\"can directly set column : \" + str(column) + \" to sortable\")\r\n                #print(self.data['columns'][column])\r\n                self.data['columns'][column]['sortable'] = True\r\n\r\n    def get_data(self, key):\r\n        return self.data.get(key, None)\r\n    \r\n    def to_dict(self):\r\n        return self.data",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    def __init__(self):\r"

            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "        self.data = {}\r"

            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    def transform_dict(self, data_dict):\r"

            "text": "            'headerGroups': [\r"

            "text": "                {'title': col, 'key': str(i), 'sortable': False} \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "                for i, col in enumerate(data_dict['columns'])\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,

          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "            'data': [\r"

            "text": "                {str(i): value for i, value in enumerate(row)}\r"
          },
          {

        "originalContents": "from typing import List\r\n\r\n\r\nclass DataDict:\r\n    def __init__(self):\r\n        self.data = {}\r\n\r\n    def transform_dict(self, data_dict):\r\n        self.data = {\r\n            'headerGroups': [\r\n                {'title': group[0], 'colspan': group[1]} \r\n                for group in data_dict['headerGroups']\r\n            ],\r\n            'columns': [\r\n                {'title': col, 'key': str(i), 'sortable': False} \r\n                for i, col in enumerate(data_dict['columns'])\r\n            ],\r\n            'data': [\r\n                {str(i): value for i, value in enumerate(row)}\r\n                for row in data_dict['data']\r\n            ],\r\n            'rowNumbering': True\r\n        }\r\n        return self\r\n\r\n    def add_data(self, key, value):\r\n        self.data[key] = value\r\n\r\n    def make_sortable(self, columns_to_make_sortable):\r\n        \r\n        if not isinstance(columns_to_make_sortable, list):\r\n            columns_to_make_sortable = [columns_to_make_sortable]\r\n\r\n        for column in columns_to_make_sortable:\r\n            if isinstance(column, str):\r\n                print(\"make_sortable: need to find column : \" + str(column))\r\n                print(\"make_sortable: NOT IMPLEMENTED\")\r\n                \r\n            if isinstance(column, int):\r\n                #print(\"can directly set column : \" + str(column) + \" to sortable\")\r\n                #print(self.data['columns'][column])\r\n                self.data['columns'][column]['sortable'] = True\r\n\r\n    def get_data(self, key):\r\n        return self.data.get(key, None)\r\n    \r\n    def to_dict(self):\r\n        return self.data",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 25,
            "line": 48
          },

            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    function updateTableBodyRegular(tableData) {\r\n        tableData.forEach((rowData, rowIndex) =\u003e {\r\n            const tr = document.createElement('tr');\r\n            \r\n            let colIndex = 0;  // Track the flat column index\r\n            \r\n            data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                    colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                        const td = document.createElement('td');\r\n                        td.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                        td.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                        \r\n                        // Get the value for this cell\r\n                        const value = rowData[colIndex++];\r\n                        \r\n                        // Special handling for position column (first column of first group)\r\n                        if (groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0 \u0026\u0026 !disablePositionCircle) {\r\n                            // Use the position value (not team name) for the circle\r\n                            const color = getTeamColor(rowData[1]); // Still use team name for color\r\n                            td.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold; margin: 0 auto;\"\u003e${value}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            td.textContent = value;\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n                        // Apply column styles\r\n                        if (col.style) {\r\n                            Object.entries(col.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                td.style[key] = value;\r\n                            });\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n                        // Apply group styles to cells\r\n",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each game\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            columns.extend([\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Score_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Score',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                },\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Points_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Pts',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                }\r\n            ])\r\n        \r\n        # Add total columns\r\n        columns.extend([\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Points_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Points',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Score',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Average',\r\n                'title': 'Avg',\r\n                'className': 'text-center',\r\n                'formatter': '(value || 0).toFixed(1)'\r\n            }\r\n        ])\r\n\r\n        # Create the complete table configuration matching the component's expected structure\r\n        table_config = {\r\n            'data': rows,  # The actual data rows\r\n            'columns': columns,  # Column definitions\r\n            'headerGroups': header_groups,  # Header group definitions\r\n            'rowNumbering': False,  # Disable row numbers\r\n            'positionChange': False,  # Disable position change indicators\r\n            'metadata': {  # Additional metadata\r\n                'league': league_name,\r\n                'season': season,\r\n                'week': week,\r\n                'location': 'TBD'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(table_config)\r\n        return table_config",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\r\n\r\n    ...\n\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_details_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"Get team week details as a TableData object for rendering\"\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            # Get individual player results for the team\r\n            player_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            player_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=player_filters)\r\n            \r\n            if player_data.empty:\r\n                return TableData(\r\n                    columns=[],\r\n                    data=[],\r\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get team totals (computed data)\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            # Get opponent team totals\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "class LeagueService:"
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 503.5,
            "text": "\r\n\r\n    ..."
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 504,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505,

          },

            "lineNumber": 515,

          },

            "lineNumber": 516,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "            \r"
          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 520,

            "text": "                return TableData(\r"
