        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n    def get_team_week_details_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\r\n        \"\"\"Get team week details as a TableData object for rendering\"\"\"\r\n        try:\r\n            # Get individual player results for the team\r\n            player_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            player_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=player_filters)\r\n            \r\n            if player_data.empty:\r\n                return TableData(\r\n                    columns=[],\r\n                    data=[],\r\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get team totals (computed data)\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            # Get opponent team totals\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TileData:\r\n    \"\"\"Data structure for dashboard tiles/cards.\"\"\"\r\n    title: str\r\n    value: Any  # The primary value to display\r\n    subtitle: Optional[str] = None\r\n    trend: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None  # Trend information (value, direction, etc.)\r\n    icon: Optional[str] = None\r\n    color: Optional[str] = None  # Primary color\r\n    size: str = \"small\"  # small, medium, large, wide\r\n    type: str = \"stat\"  # stat, trend, progress, chart, info\r\n    chart_data: Optional[List[Union[int, float]]] = None  # For mini charts\r\n    link: Optional[str] = None  # URL to navigate to on click\r\n    \r\n    def to_dict(self) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Convert to a dictionary suitable for JSON serialization\"\"\"\r\n        result = {\r\n            \"title\": self.title,\r\n            \"value\": self.value,\r\n            \"size\": self.size,\r\n            \"type\": self.type\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if self.subtitle:\r\n            result[\"subtitle\"] = self.subtitle\r\n        \r\n        if self.trend:\r\n            result[\"trend\"] = self.trend\r\n            \r\n        if self.icon:\r\n            result[\"icon\"] = self.icon\r\n            \r\n        if self.color:\r\n            result[\"color\"] = self.color\r\n            \r\n        if self.chart_data:\r\n            result[\"chartData\"] = self.chart_data\r\n            \r\n        if self.link:\r\n            result[\"link\"] = self.link\r\n            \r\n        return result",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@dataclass\r\nclass TileData:\r\n    \"\"\"Data structure for dashboard tiles/cards.\"\"\"\r\n    title: str\r\n    value: Any  # The primary value to display\r\n    subtitle: Optional[str] = None\r\n    trend: Optional[Dict[str, Any]] = None  # Trend information (value, direction, etc.)\r\n    icon: Optional[str] = None\r\n    color: Optional[str] = None  # Primary color\r\n    size: str = \"small\"  # small, medium, large, wide\r\n    type: str = \"stat\"  # stat, trend, progress, chart, info\r\n    chart_data: Optional[List[Union[int, float]]] = None  # For mini charts\r\n    link: Optional[str] = None  # URL to navigate to on click\r\n    \r\n    def to_dict(self) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\r\n        \"\"\"Convert to a dictionary suitable for JSON serialization\"\"\"\r\n        result = {\r\n            \"title\": self.title,\r\n            \"value\": self.value,\r\n            \"size\": self.size,\r\n            \"type\": self.type\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        if self.subtitle:\r\n            result[\"subtitle\"] = self.subtitle\r\n        \r\n        if self.trend:\r\n            result[\"trend\"] = self.trend\r\n            \r\n        if self.icon:\r\n            result[\"icon\"] = self.icon\r\n            \r\n        if self.color:\r\n            result[\"color\"] = self.color\r\n            \r\n        if self.chart_data:\r\n            result[\"chartData\"] = self.chart_data\r\n            \r\n        if self.link:\r\n            result[\"link\"] = self.link\r\n            \r\n        return result",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Add group headers\r\n    const groupHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n        th.textContent = colGroup.title || '';\r\n        th.colSpan = colGroup.columns ? colGroup.columns.length : 1;\r\n        th.style.padding = '8px';\r\n        th.style.textAlign = 'center';\r\n        th.className = 'align-middle';\r\n        \r\n        // Add vertical borders between groups\r\n        if (groupIndex \u003e 0) {\r\n            th.style.borderLeft = '2px solid #264653';\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Apply group styles\r\n        if (colGroup.style) {\r\n            Object.entries(colGroup.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                th.style[key] = value;\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Apply header styles\r\n        if (colGroup.headerStyle) {\r\n            Object.entries(colGroup.headerStyle).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                th.style[key] = value;\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Apply group width\r\n        if (colGroup.width) {\r\n            th.style.width = colGroup.width;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Freeze column group headers if the group is frozen\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nclass DataAdapter(ABC):\r\n    \"\"\"Abstract base class for data adapters\"\"\"\r\n    \r\n    # Define standard operators that all adapters should support\r\n    OPERATORS = {\r\n        \"eq\": \"Equal to\",\r\n        \"ne\": \"Not equal to\",\r\n        \"lt\": \"Less than\",\r\n        \"le\": \"Less than or equal to\",\r\n        \"gt\": \"Greater than\",\r\n        \"ge\": \"Greater than or equal to\",\r\n        \"in\": \"In list\",\r\n        \"not_in\": \"Not in list\",\r\n        \"contains\": \"String contains\",\r\n        \"startswith\": \"String starts with\",\r\n        \"endswith\": \"String ends with\"\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_player_data(self, player_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get player data for a specific season\"\"\"\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_all_players(self) -\u003e List[str]:\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_filtered_data(self, filters: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get filtered data based on provided filters\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            filters: Dictionary of column names to filter dictionaries\r\n                   Each filter dictionary should have:\r\n                   - 'value': The value to filter by\r\n                   - 'operator': The operator to use (must be one of OPERATORS keys)\r\n        \r\n        Returns:\r\n            DataFrame containing the filtered data\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_league_standings(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get league standings for a specific season\"\"\"\r\n        pass",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "import pandas as pd\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "from data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "from abc import ABC, abstractmethod\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "from typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "import pandas as pd\r\n\r\nfrom data_access.schema import Columns, ColumnsExtra\r\nfrom abc import ABC, abstractmethod\r\nfrom typing import List, Dict, Any, Optional\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\nclass DataAdapter(ABC):\r\n    \"\"\"Abstract base class for data adapters\"\"\"\r\n    \r\n    # Define standard operators that all adapters should support\r\n    OPERATORS = {\r\n        \"eq\": \"Equal to\",\r\n        \"ne\": \"Not equal to\",\r\n        \"lt\": \"Less than\",\r\n        \"le\": \"Less than or equal to\",\r\n        \"gt\": \"Greater than\",\r\n        \"ge\": \"Greater than or equal to\",\r\n        \"in\": \"In list\",\r\n        \"not_in\": \"Not in list\",\r\n        \"contains\": \"String contains\",\r\n        \"startswith\": \"String starts with\",\r\n        \"endswith\": \"String ends with\"\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_player_data(self, player_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get player data for a specific season\"\"\"\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_all_players(self) -\u003e List[str]:\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_filtered_data(self, filters: Dict[str, Dict[str, Any]]) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get filtered data based on provided filters\r\n        \r\n        Args:\r\n            filters: Dictionary of column names to filter dictionaries\r\n                   Each filter dictionary should have:\r\n                   - 'value': The value to filter by\r\n                   - 'operator': The operator to use (must be one of OPERATORS keys)\r\n        \r\n        Returns:\r\n            DataFrame containing the filtered data\r\n        \"\"\"\r\n        pass\r\n\r\n    @abstractmethod\r\n    def get_league_standings(self, league_name: str, season: str) -\u003e pd.DataFrame:\r\n        \"\"\"Get league standings for a specific season\"\"\"\r\n        pass",

'2px solid #dee2e6' \r\n                                             : '1px solid #dee2e6'};\"\u003e\r\n                        ${row[colIndex] !== undefined ? row[colIndex] : ''}\r\n                    \u003c/td\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n        &#96;).join('');\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    return &#96;\r\n        \u003ctable class=\"table\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cthead\u003e\r\n                ${createHeaderGroups()}\r\n                ${createColumnHeaders()}\r\n            \u003c/thead\u003e\r\n            \u003ctbody\u003e\r\n                ${createTableRows()}\r\n            \u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n        \u003c/table\u003e\r\n    &#96;;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n// Function to convert hex color to RGB\r\nconst hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n    const bigint = parseInt(hex.slice(1), 16);\r\n    const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n    const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n    const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n    return [r, g, b];\r\n};\r\n\r\n// Function to get colors for groups\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".custom-tabulator {\r\n    border: none; /* Remove default borders */\r\n    background-color: transparent; /* Make background transparent */\r\n    font-family: 'Your Custom Font', sans-serif; /* Use your site's font */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Header Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header {\r\n    background-color: #f8f9fa; /* Light background for header */\r\n    color: #264653; /* Dark text color */\r\n    font-weight: bold; /* Bold header text */\r\n    border-bottom: 2px solid #264653; /* Subtle border */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Column Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col {\r\n    border-right: 1px solid #264653; /* Subtle column borders */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-col .tabulator-col-content {\r\n    padding: 10px; /* Add padding for better spacing */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Row Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row {\r\n    border-bottom: 1px solid #264653; /* Subtle row borders */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row.tabulator-row-even {\r\n    background-color: #f9f9f9; /* Light gray for even rows */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row.tabulator-row-odd {\r\n    background-color: #ffffff; /* White for odd rows */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Hover Effects */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-row:hover {\r\n    background-color: rgba(38, 70, 83, 0.1); /* Light hover effect */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Frozen Column Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-frozen {\r\n    background-color: #ffffff; /* Background for frozen columns */\r\n    z-index: 10; /* Ensure frozen columns are above others */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Scrollbar Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar {\r\n    width: 8px; /* Width of the scrollbar */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-track {\r\n    background: #f1f1f1; /* Track color */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {\r\n    background: #264653; /* Thumb color */\r\n    border-radius: 4px; /* Rounded corners */\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

        "originalContents": ".custom-tabulator {\r\n    border: none; /* Remove default borders */\r\n    background-color: transparent; /* Make background transparent */\r\n    font-family: 'Your Custom Font', sans-serif; /* Use your site's font */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Header Styles */\r\n.custom-tabulator .tabulator-header {\r\n    background-color: #f8f9fa; /* Light background for header */\r\n    color: #264653; /* Dark text color */\r\n    font-weight: bold;     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "    function updateTableBodyRegular(tableData) {\r\n        tableData.forEach((rowData, rowIndex) =\u003e {\r\n            const tr = document.createElement('tr');\r\n            \r\n            let colIndex = 0;  // Track the flat column index\r\n            \r\n            data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                    colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                        const td = document.createElement('td');\r\n                        td.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                        td.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                        \r\n                        // Get the value for this cell\r\n                        const value = rowData[colIndex++];\r\n                        \r\n                        // Special handling for position column (first column of first group)\r\n                        if (groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0 \u0026\u0026 !disablePositionCircle) {\r\n                            // Use the position value (not team name) for the circle\r\n                            const color = getTeamColor(rowData[1]); // Still use team name for color\r\n                            td.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold; margin: 0 auto;\"\u003e${value}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            td.textContent = value;\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n                        // Apply column styles\r\n                        if (col.style) {\r\n                            Object.entries(col.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                td.style[key] = value;\r\n                            });\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n                        // Apply group styles to cells\r\n",

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1008,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1010,
            "text": "                        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1011,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1012,

          },

            "lineNumber": 1013,
            "text": "                        if (col.style) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1014,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1015,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1016,
            "text": "                            });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1017,

            "lineNumber": 1018,

          {
            "lineNumber": 1019,
            "text": "                        // Apply group styles to cells\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1020
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "    function updateTableBodyRegular(tableData) {\r\n        tableData.forEach((rowData, rowIndex) =\u003e {\r\n            const tr = document.createElement('tr');\r\n            \r\n            let colIndex = 0;  // Track the flat column index\r\n            \r\n            data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                    colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                        const td = document.createElement('td');\r\n                        td.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                        td.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                        \r\n                        // Get the value for this cell\r\n                        const value = rowData[colIndex++];\r\n                        \r\n                        // Special handling for position column (first column of first group)\r\n                        if (groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0 \u0026\u0026 !disablePositionCircle) {\r\n                            // Use the position value (not team name) for the circle\r\n                            const color = getTeamColor(rowData[1]); // Still use team name for color\r\n                            td.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold; margin: 0 auto;\"\u003e${value}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                        } else {\r\n                            td.textContent = value;\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n                        // Apply column styles\r\n                        if (col.style) {\r\n                            Object.entries(col.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                td.style[key] = value;\r\n                            });\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n                        // Apply group styles to cells\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1020
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 987
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003clink href=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/css/tabulator.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/js/tabulator.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nfunction createTable(config) {\r\n    const {\r\n        data,\r\n        columns,\r\n        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r\n        rowNumbering = true,\r\n        positionChange = false\r\n    } = config;\r\n\r\n    let currentData = [...data];\r\n\r\n    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r\n    const getGroupColors = () =\u003e {\r\n        const endColor = '#7ec2f8';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n        const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n        const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n        \r\n        return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n            if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n            if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n            \r\n            const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n            const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n            const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n            const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n        });\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n        hex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');\r\n        const bigint = parseInt(hex, 16);\r\n        const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n        const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n        const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n        return [r, g, b];\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const colors = getGroupColors();\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 35,

            "lineNumber": 40,

          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        return [r, g, b];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    const colors = getGroupColors();\r"

        ],
        "originalContents": "\u003clink href=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/css/tabulator.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/js/tabulator.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nfunction createTable(config) {\r\n    const {\r\n        data,\r\n        columns,\r\n        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r\n        rowNumbering = true,\r\n        positionChange = false\r\n    } = config;\r\n\r\n    let currentData = [...data];\r\n\r\n    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r\n    const getGroupColors = () =\u003e {\r\n        const endColor = '#7ec2f8';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n        const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n        const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n        \r\n        return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n            if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n            if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n            \r\n            const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n            const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n            const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n            const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n        });\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n        hex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');\r\n        const bigint = parseInt(hex, 16);\r\n        const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n        const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n        const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n        return [r, g, b];\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const colors = getGroupColors();\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Create mappings for column colors and last group columns\r\n    const columnColors = {};\r\n    const lastGroupColumns = {};\r\n    let currentColumn = 0;\r\n    headerGroups.forEach((group, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        const isLastGroup = groupIndex === headerGroups.length - 1;\r\n        const colspan = group.colspan || 1;  // Get actual colspan from the group\r\n        for (let i = 0; i \u003c colspan; i++) {\r\n            columnColors[currentColumn] = colors[groupIndex];\r\n            lastGroupColumns[currentColumn] = isLastGroup;\r\n            currentColumn++;\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    const createHeaderGroups = () =\u003e {\r\n        if (!headerGroups || headerGroups.length === 0) return '';\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                ${headerGroups.map((group, index) =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cth class=\"text-center\" \r\n                        colspan=\"${group.colspan || 1}\" \r\n                        style=\"background-color: ${colors[index]}; \r\n                               color: ${index === headerGroups.length - 1 ? 'white' : 'black'};\"\u003e\r\n                        ${group.title || ''}\r\n                    \u003c/th\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const createColumnHeaders = () =\u003e {\r\n        return &#96;\r\n            \u003ctr\u003e\r\n                ${columns.map((col, index) =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cth class=\"text-center\" \r\n                        style=\"background-color: ${columnColors[index]};\r\n                               color: ${lastGroupColumns[index] ? 'white' : 'black'};\r\n                               font-weight: ${lastGroupColumns[index] ? 'bold' : 'normal'};\"\u003e\r\n                        ${col.title || ''}\r\n                    \u003c/th\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    };\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "                            } else {\r\n                                // Regular columns - create cells for both rows\r\n                                const td1 = document.createElement('td');\r\n                                const td2 = document.createElement('td');\r\n                                \r\n                                td1.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                                td2.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                                td1.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                                td2.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                                \r\n                                const value1 = row1.rowData[flatIndex];\r\n                                const value2 = row2.rowData[flatIndex];\r\n                                \r\n                                // Handle position circle for first column of first group\r\n                                if (groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0 \u0026\u0026 !disablePositionCircle) {\r\n                                    const color1 = getTeamColor(row1.rowData[1]);\r\n                                    const color2 = getTeamColor(row2.rowData[1]);\r\n                                    td1.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color1}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold; margin: 0 auto;\"\u003e${value1}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                                    td2.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color2}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold; margin: 0 auto;\"\u003e${value2}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                                } else {\r\n                                    td1.textContent = value1;\r\n                                    td2.textContent = value2;\r\n                                }\r\n                                \r\n                                // Apply styles\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 907,
            "text": "                            } else {\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 908,
            "text": "                                // Regular columns - create cells for both rows\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 909,
            "text": "                                const td1 = document.createElement('td');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 910,
            "text": "                                const td2 = document.createElement('td');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 911,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 912,
            "text": "                                td1.style.padding = '8px';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 913,
            "text": "                                td2.style.padding = '8px';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 914,
            "text": "                                td1.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 915,
            "text": "                                td2.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 916,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 917,

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 920,
            "text": "                                // Handle position circle for first column of first group\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 921,
            "text": "                                if (groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0 \u0026\u0026 !disablePositionCircle) {\r"

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 926,
            "text": "                                } else {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 927,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 928,
            "text": "                                    td2.textContent = value2;\r"
          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 930,

          },
          {

            "lineNumber": 932

        "originalContents": "                            } else {\r\n                                // Regular columns - create cells for both rows\r\n                                const td1 = document.createElement('td');\r\n                                const td2 = document.createElement('td');\r\n                                \r\n                                td1.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                                td2.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                                td1.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                                td2.style.textAlign = col.align || 'center';\r\n                                \r\n                                const value1 = row1.rowData[flatIndex];\r\n                                const value2 = row2.rowData[flatIndex];\r\n                                \r\n                                // Handle position circle for first column of first group\r\n                                if (groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0 \u0026\u0026 !disablePositionCircle) {\r\n                                    const color1 = getTeamColor(row1.rowData[1]);\r\n                                    const color2 = getTeamColor(row2.rowData[1]);\r\n                                    td1.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color1}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold; margin: 0 auto;\"\u003e${value1}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                                    td2.innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"width: 24px; height: 24px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color2}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold; margin: 0 auto;\"\u003e${value2}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                                } else {\r\n                                    td1.textContent = value1;\r\n                                    td2.textContent = value2;\r\n                                }\r\n                                \r\n                                // Apply styles\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": ".custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {\r\n    background: rgba(38, 70, 83, 0.8); /* Darker thumb on hover */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Add this to your CSS file or style section */\r\n.tabulator-col-group {\r\n    background-color: white !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"0\"] {\r\n    background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"1\"] {\r\n    background-color: rgb(242, 247, 251) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"2\"] {\r\n    background-color: rgb(229, 239, 247) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n.border-right {\r\n    border-right: 1px solid #264653; /* Bootstrap's default border color */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.table-responsive {\r\n    overflow-x: auto; /* Enable horizontal scrolling */\r\n}\r\n\r\nth {\r\n    position: relative; /* Required for sticky positioning */\r\n    background-color: #f8f9fa; /* Header background color */\r\n}\r\n/* Add more rules based on your number of groups */\r\n\r\n/* Remove ALL visual separation between frozen and non-frozen columns */\r\n[style*=\"position: sticky\"] {\r\n    box-shadow: none !important;\r\n    border-right: none !important;\r\n    border-left: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Remove any nth-child selectors that might be adding shadows */\r\ntr \u003e td:nth-child(2)[style*=\"position: sticky\"],\r\ntr \u003e th:nth-child(2)[style*=\"position: sticky\"] {\r\n    box-shadow: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Ensure no borders between position and team columns */\r\ntr \u003e td:first-child,\r\ntr \u003e th:first-child {\r\n    border-right: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\ntr \u003e td:nth-child(2),\r\ntr \u003e th:nth-child(2) {\r\n    border-left: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\u003c/style\u003e ",

          {
            "lineNumber": 1223,
            "text": ".border-right {\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 1227,
            "text": ".table-responsive {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1228,
            "text": "    overflow-x: auto; /* Enable horizontal scrolling */\r"

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1231,
            "text": "th {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1232,
            "text": "    position: relative; /* Required for sticky positioning */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1233,
            "text": "    background-color: #f8f9fa; /* Header background color */\r"
          },
          {

            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1235,
            "text": "/* Add more rules based on your number of groups */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1236,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1237,
            "text": "/* Remove ALL visual separation between frozen and non-frozen columns */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1238,
            "text": "[style*=\"position: sticky\"] {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1239,
            "text": "    box-shadow: none !important;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1240,
            "text": "    border-right: none !important;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1241,
            "text": "    border-left: none !important;\r"

            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1243,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1244,
            "text": "/* Remove any nth-child selectors that might be adding shadows */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1245,
            "text": "tr \u003e td:nth-child(2)[style*=\"position: sticky\"],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1246,
            "text": "tr \u003e th:nth-child(2)[style*=\"position: sticky\"] {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1247,
            "text": "    box-shadow: none !important;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1248,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1249,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1250,
            "text": "/* Ensure no borders between position and team columns */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1251,
            "text": "tr \u003e td:first-child,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1252,
            "text": "tr \u003e th:first-child {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1253,
            "text": "    border-right: none !important;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1254,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 1255,
            "text": "\r"
          },

        "originalContents": ".custom-tabulator .tabulator-tableHolder::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover {\r\n    background: rgba(38, 70, 83, 0.8); /* Darker thumb on hover */\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Add this to your CSS file or style section */\r\n.tabulator-col-group {\r\n    background-color: white !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"0\"] {\r\n    background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"1\"] {\r\n    background-color: rgb(242, 247, 251) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n.tabulator-col-group[data-group-index=\"2\"] {\r\n    background-color: rgb(229, 239, 247) !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n.border-right {\r\n    border-right: 1px solid #264653; /* Bootstrap's default border color */\r\n}\r\n\r\n.table-responsive {\r\n    overflow-x: auto; /* Enable horizontal scrolling */\r\n}\r\n\r\nth {\r\n    position: relative; /* Required for sticky positioning */\r\n    background-color: #f8f9fa; /* Header background color */\r\n}\r\n/* Add more rules based on your number of groups */\r\n\r\n/* Remove ALL visual separation between frozen and non-frozen columns */\r\n[style*=\"position: sticky\"] {\r\n    box-shadow: none !important;\r\n    border-right: none !important;\r\n    border-left: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Remove any nth-child selectors that might be adding shadows */\r\ntr \u003e td:nth-child(2)[style*=\"position: sticky\"],\r\ntr \u003e th:nth-child(2)[style*=\"position: sticky\"] {\r\n    box-shadow: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\n/* Ensure no borders between position and team columns */\r\ntr \u003e td:first-child,\r\ntr \u003e th:first-child {\r\n    border-right: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\r\ntr \u003e td:nth-child(2),\r\ntr \u003e th:nth-child(2) {\r\n    border-left: none !important;\r\n}\r\n\u003c/style\u003e ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Process columns to ensure frozen properties are set and add group indices\r\n    const processedColumns = data.columns.map((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        const newColGroup = { ...colGroup };\r\n        \r\n        if (newColGroup.columns) {\r\n            newColGroup.columns = newColGroup.columns.map((subCol, subIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                const newSubCol = { ...subCol };\r\n\r\n                // Add subtle vertical lines between column groups\r\n                if (subIndex \u003c newColGroup.columns.length - 1) {\r\n                    newSubCol.cssClass = 'border-right'; // Add a class for right border\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                // Set the formatter for the first column to apply color\r\n                if (subIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 groupIndex === 0) { // Assuming the first column is the position\r\n                    newSubCol.formatter = function(cell) {\r\n                        const team = cell.getRow().getData().team; // Assuming 'team' is the field for the second column\r\n                        const color = getTeamColor(team); // Get the color for the team\r\n                        const value = cell.getValue(); // Get the cell value\r\n\r\n                        // Create a colored circle with the content inside\r\n                        return &#96;\u003cdiv style=\"display: flex; align-items: center;\"\u003e\r\n                                    \u003cdiv style=\"width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${color}; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold;\"\u003e\r\n                                        ${value}\r\n                                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n                    };\r\n                }\r\n\r\n                return newSubCol;\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        return newColGroup;\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    // Destroy existing instance if it exists\r\n    if (window[tableId + 'Instance']) {\r\n        window[tableId + 'Instance'].destroy();\r\n    }\r\n",

      "score": 0.30126953125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const getGroupColors = (headerGroups) =\u003e {\r\n    const endColor = '#2196F3';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n    const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n    const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n    \r\n    return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n        if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n        if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n        \r\n        const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n        const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n        const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n        const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n    });\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction createTableTabulator(tableId, data) {\r\n    // Check if the data has columns and data\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.error('Invalid data format');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Transform the data from array format to object format\r\n    const transformedData = data.data.map(row =\u003e {\r\n        const obj = {};\r\n        let index = 0; // Initialize index to track the position in the row array\r\n\r\n        // Loop through each column group\r\n        data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n            if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                // Loop through each column in the group\r\n                colGroup.columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    obj[col.field] = row[index]; // Assign the value from the row to the object\r\n                    index++; // Increment index for the next field\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        return obj; // Return the transformed object\r\n    });\r\n",

        "originalContents": "const getGroupColors = (headerGroups) =\u003e {\r\n    const endColor = '#2196F3';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n    const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n    const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n    \r\n    return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n        if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n        if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n        \r\n        const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n        const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n        const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n        const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n    });\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction createTableTabulator(tableId, data) {\r\n    // Check if the data has columns and data\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.error('Invalid data format');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Transform the data from array format to object format\r\n    const transformedData = data.data.map(row =\u003e {\r\n        const obj = {};\r\n        let index = 0; // Initialize index to track the position in the row array\r\n\r\n        // Loop through each column group\r\n        data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n            if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                // Loop through each column in the group\r\n                colGroup.columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    obj[col.field] = row[index]; // Assign the value from the row to the object\r\n                    index++; // Increment index for the next field\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        return obj; // Return the transformed object\r\n    });\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Create table\r\n    const table = document.createElement('table');\r\n    table.className = 'table table-striped table-hover';\r\n\r\n    // Create header\r\n    const thead = document.createElement('thead');\r\n\r\n    // Add group headers\r\n    const groupHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n        const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n        th.textContent = colGroup.title || '';\r\n        th.colSpan = colGroup.columns ? colGroup.columns.length : 1;\r\n        groupHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n    });\r\n    thead.appendChild(groupHeaderRow);\r\n\r\n    // Add sub-headers\r\n    const subHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n        if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n            colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n                th.textContent = col.title || '';\r\n                // Add subtle vertical lines between column groups\r\n                if (index \u003c colGroup.columns.length - 1) {\r\n                    th.style.borderRight = '1px solid #dee2e6'; // Bootstrap's default border color\r\n                }\r\n                subHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n    thead.appendChild(subHeaderRow);\r\n    \r\n    table.appendChild(thead);\r\n\r\n    // Create body\r\n    const tbody = document.createElement('tbody');\r\n\r\n    // Add rows\r\n    transformedData.forEach(rowData =\u003e {\r\n        const tr = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n            if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                    const td = document.createElement('td');\r\n                    td.textContent = rowData[col.field] || ''; // Use the transformed data\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        if (colGroup.frozen) {\r\n            th.style.position = 'sticky';\r\n            if (colGroup.frozen === 'left') {\r\n                // Calculate left position based on previous frozen groups\r\n                let leftPos = 0;\r\n                for (let g = 0; g \u003c groupIndex; g++) {\r\n                    if (data.columns[g].frozen === 'left') {\r\n                        // Sum up widths of all columns in previous frozen groups\r\n                        data.columns[g].columns.forEach(c =\u003e {\r\n                            leftPos += parseInt(c.width || '100px');\r\n                        });\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n                th.style.left = &#96;${leftPos}px&#96;;\r\n            }\r\n            th.style.zIndex = '2';  // Higher than regular cells\r\n            th.style.backgroundColor = colGroup.style?.backgroundColor || '#fff';\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        groupHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n    });\r\n    thead.appendChild(groupHeaderRow);\r\n\r\n    // Add sub-headers with sort functionality\r\n    const subHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    let sortState = {};  // Track sort state for each column\r\n    const lastGroupIndex = data.columns.length - 1;  // Get the index of the last group\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Add group headers\r\n    const groupHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n        const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n        th.textContent = colGroup.title || '';\r\n        th.colSpan = colGroup.columns ? colGroup.columns.length : 1;\r\n        th.style.padding = '8px';\r\n        th.style.textAlign = 'center';\r\n        th.className = 'align-middle';\r\n        \r\n        // Add vertical borders between groups\r\n        if (groupIndex \u003e 0) {\r\n            th.style.borderLeft = '2px solid #264653';\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Apply group styles\r\n        if (colGroup.style) {\r\n            Object.entries(colGroup.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                th.style[key] = value;\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Apply header styles\r\n        if (colGroup.headerStyle) {\r\n            Object.entries(colGroup.headerStyle).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                th.style[key] = value;\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Apply group width\r\n        if (colGroup.width) {\r\n            th.style.width = colGroup.width;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Freeze column group headers if the group is frozen\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "                            if (isRoundNumberColumn) {\r\n                                // Merge round number column - only show in first row\r\n                                const td1 = document.createElement('td');\r\n                                td1.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                                td1.style.textAlign = 'center';\r\n                                td1.style.verticalAlign = 'middle';\r\n                                td1.setAttribute('rowspan', '2'); // Merge 2 rows\r\n                                td1.textContent = row1.rowData[flatIndex];\r\n                                \r\n                                // Apply styles\r\n                                if (col.style) {\r\n                                    Object.entries(col.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                        td1.style[key] = value;\r\n                                    });\r\n                                }\r\n                                \r\n                                if (colGroup.style) {\r\n                                    Object.entries(colGroup.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                        td1.style[key] = value;\r\n                                    });\r\n                                }\r\n                                \r\n                                tr1.appendChild(td1);\r\n                                // Don't add to tr2 since it's merged\r\n                            ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "                        if (colGroup.frozen) {\r\n                            td.style.position = 'sticky';\r\n                            if (colGroup.frozen === 'left') {\r\n                                // Calculate left position based on previous frozen columns\r\n                                let leftPos = 0;\r\n                                for (let g = 0; g \u003c groupIndex; g++) {\r\n                                    if (data.columns[g].frozen === 'left') {\r\n                                        data.columns[g].columns.forEach(c =\u003e {\r\n                                            leftPos += parseInt(c.width || '100px');\r\n                                        });\r\n                                    }\r\n                                }\r\n                                // Add offset for current group's previous columns\r\n                                for (let i = 0; i \u003c index; i++) {\r\n                                    leftPos += parseInt(colGroup.columns[i].width || '100px');\r\n                                }\r\n                                td.style.left = &#96;${leftPos}px&#96;;\r\n                                \r\n                                // Remove ALL visual separation\r\n                                td.style.boxShadow = 'none';\r\n                                td.style.borderRight = 'none';\r\n                                td.style.borderLeft = 'none';\r\n                            }\r\n                            td.style.zIndex = '1';\r\n                            td.style.backgroundColor = colGroup.style?.backgroundColor || '#fff';\r\n                        }\r\n                        \r\n                        tr.appendChild(td);\r\n                    });\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n            \r\n            tbody.appendChild(tr);\r\n        });\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Initial population of table body\r\n    updateTableBody(data.data);\r\n    \r\n    tableWrapper.appendChild(table);\r\n    document.getElementById(tableId).innerHTML = '';  // Clear existing content\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\r\n\u003chtml lang=\"en\"\u003e\r\n\u003chead\u003e\r\n    \u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cmeta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ctitle\u003eBowl-A-Lyzer\u003c/title\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Bootstrap CSS --\u003e\r\n    \u003clink href=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Custom CSS --\u003e\r\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\r\n        :root {\r\n            /* Color Palette */\r\n            --color-green-light: #a1e8c4;   /* Lightest green */\r\n            --color-green: #86e1b3;         /* Light green */\r\n            --color-blue-lightest: #7dcfe6; /* Light blue-green */\r\n            --color-blue-light: #4aa8c2;    /* Light blue */\r\n            --color-blue: #0a9dc7;          /* Dark blue */\r\n\r\n\r\n            /* Semantic Color Assignments */\r\n            --theme-primary: var(--color-blue);         /* Main UI elements like navbar, card headers */\r\n            --theme-secondary: var(--color-blue-light); /* Buttons, interactive elements */\r\n            --theme-accent: var(--color-blue-lightest); /* Highlights, accents */\r\n            --theme-warning: var(--color-green);        /* Warning states */\r\n            --theme-info: var(--color-green-light);     /* Info states */\r\n            \r\n            /* Background Colors */\r\n            --theme-background: #f8f9fa;\r\n            --theme-surface: #ffffff;\r\n            \r\n            /* Text Colors */\r\n            --theme-text-on-primary: #ffffff;\r\n            --theme-text-on-secondary: #ffffff;\r\n            --theme-text-on-light: var(--color-blue);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        body {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-background);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .navbar {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-primary) !important;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .navbar-brand, .nav-link {\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-primary) !important;\r\n        }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        :root {\r"

            "text": "            /* Color Palette */\r"

            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            --color-blue-light: #4aa8c2;    /* Light blue */\r"

          {

          {

        "originalContents": "\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\r\n\u003chtml lang=\"en\"\u003e\r\n\u003chead\u003e\r\n    \u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cmeta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ctitle\u003eBowl-A-Lyzer\u003c/title\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Bootstrap CSS --\u003e\r\n    \u003clink href=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Custom CSS --\u003e\r\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\r\n        :root {\r\n            /* Color Palette */\r\n            --color-green-light: #a1e8c4;   /* Lightest green */\r\n            --color-green: #86e1b3;         /* Light green */\r\n            --color-blue-lightest: #7dcfe6; /* Light blue-green */\r\n            --color-blue-light: #4aa8c2;    /* Light blue */\r\n            --color-blue: #0a9dc7;          /* Dark blue */\r\n\r\n\r\n            /* Semantic Color Assignments */\r\n            --theme-primary: var(--color-blue);         /* Main UI elements like navbar, card headers */\r\n            --theme-secondary: var(--color-blue-light); /* Buttons, interactive elements */\r\n            --theme-accent: var(--color-blue-lightest); /* Highlights, accents */\r\n            --theme-warning: var(--color-green);        /* Warning states */\r\n            --theme-info: var(--color-green-light);     /* Info states */\r\n            \r\n            /* Background Colors */\r\n            --theme-background: #f8f9fa;\r\n            --theme-surface: #ffffff;\r\n            \r\n            /* Text Colors */\r\n            --theme-text-on-primary: #ffffff;\r\n            --theme-text-on-secondary: #ffffff;\r\n            --theme-text-on-light: var(--color-blue);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        body {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-background);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .navbar {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-primary) !important;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .navbar-brand, .nav-link {\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-primary) !important;\r\n        }\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "                if (colGroup.frozen) {\r\n                    th.style.position = 'sticky';\r\n                    if (colGroup.frozen === 'left') {\r\n                        // Calculate left position based on previous frozen columns\r\n                        let leftPos = 0;\r\n                        for (let g = 0; g \u003c groupIndex; g++) {\r\n                            if (data.columns[g].frozen === 'left') {\r\n                                data.columns[g].columns.forEach(c =\u003e {\r\n                                    leftPos += parseInt(c.width || '100px');\r\n                                });\r\n                            }\r\n                        }\r\n                        // Add offset for current group's previous columns\r\n                        for (let i = 0; i \u003c index; i++) {\r\n                            leftPos += parseInt(colGroup.columns[i].width || '100px');\r\n                        }\r\n                        th.style.left = &#96;${leftPos}px&#96;;\r\n                    }\r\n                    th.style.zIndex = '2';  // Higher than regular cells\r\n                    th.style.backgroundColor = colGroup.style?.backgroundColor || '#fff';\r\n                }\r\n                \r\n                subHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n    thead.appendChild(subHeaderRow);\r\n    table.appendChild(thead);\r\n\r\n    // Create body\r\n    const tbody = document.createElement('tbody');\r\n    table.appendChild(tbody);\r\n\r\n    // Helper function to get flat column index\r\n    function getFlatColumnIndex(columns, groupIndex, colIndex) {\r\n        let flatIndex = 0;\r\n        for (let g = 0; g \u003c groupIndex; g++) {\r\n            flatIndex += columns[g].columns ? columns[g].columns.length : 1;\r\n        }\r\n        return flatIndex + colIndex;\r\n    }\r\n",

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_league_week_table(self, season: str, league: str, week: Optional[int] = None, depth: int = 1) -\u003e TableData:\n\r\n        ...\n\r\n        for w in range(start_week, week + 1):\r\n            columns.append(\r\n                ColumnGroup(\r\n                    title=f\"Week {w}\",\r\n                    columns=[\r\n                        Column(title=\"Pins\", field=f\"week{w}_score\", format=\"{:,}\"),\r\n                        Column(title=\"Pts.\", field=f\"week{w}_points\", format=\"{:.1f}\"),\r\n                        Column(title=\"Avg.\", field=f\"week{w}_avg\", format=\"{:.1f}\")\r\n                    ]\r\n                )\r\n            )\r\n        \r\n        # Add season total column with special styling\r\n        columns.append(\r\n            ColumnGroup(\r\n                title=\"Season Total\",\r\n                style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#e9ecef\"},  # Slightly darker background\r\n                header_style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"},  # Bold header\r\n                columns=[\r\n                    Column(\r\n                        title=\"Pins\", \r\n                        field=\"season_total_score\", \r\n                        format=\"{:,}\",\r\n                        style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"}\r\n                    ),\r\n                    Column(\r\n                        title=\"Pts.\", \r\n                        field=\"season_total_points\", \r\n                        format=\"{:.1f}\",\r\n                        style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"}\r\n                    ),\r\n                    Column(\r\n                        title=\"Avg.\", \r\n                        field=\"season_total_average\", \r\n                        format=\"{:.1f}\",\r\n                        style={\"fontWeight\": \"bold\"}\r\n                    )\r\n                ]\r\n            )\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        # Prepare the data rows\r\n        data = []",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "        groupedRows.forEach((rows) =\u003e {\r\n            if (rows.length === 2) { // We expect exactly 2 rows per match\r\n                const [row1, row2] = rows;\r\n                const tr1 = document.createElement('tr');\r\n                const tr2 = document.createElement('tr');\r\n                \r\n                let colIndex = 0;\r\n                \r\n                data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                    if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                        colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                            const flatIndex = colIndex++;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is the first column of the first group (round number) - should be merged\r\n                            const isRoundNumberColumn = groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is the second column of the first group (opponent name) - should be merged\r\n                            const isOpponentColumn = groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 1;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is the third column of the first group (total points) - should be merged\r\n                            const isTotalPointsColumn = groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 2;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is a points column (last column in each group except the first)\r\n                            const isPointsColumn = col.field \u0026\u0026 col.field.includes('points') \u0026\u0026 col.field !== 'total_points';\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is a team points column (should be merged)\r\n                            const isTeamPointsColumn = col.field === 'team_points';\r\n                            \r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 755,
            "text": "        groupedRows.forEach((rows) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 756,
            "text": "            if (rows.length === 2) { // We expect exactly 2 rows per match\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "        groupedRows.forEach((rows) =\u003e {\r\n            if (rows.length === 2) { // We expect exactly 2 rows per match\r\n                const [row1, row2] = rows;\r\n                const tr1 = document.createElement('tr');\r\n                const tr2 = document.createElement('tr');\r\n                \r\n                let colIndex = 0;\r\n                \r\n                data.columns.forEach((colGroup, groupIndex) =\u003e {\r\n                    if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                        colGroup.columns.forEach((col, index) =\u003e {\r\n                            const flatIndex = colIndex++;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is the first column of the first group (round number) - should be merged\r\n                            const isRoundNumberColumn = groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 0;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is the second column of the first group (opponent name) - should be merged\r\n                            const isOpponentColumn = groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 1;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is the third column of the first group (total points) - should be merged\r\n                            const isTotalPointsColumn = groupIndex === 0 \u0026\u0026 index === 2;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is a points column (last column in each group except the first)\r\n                            const isPointsColumn = col.field \u0026\u0026 col.field.includes('points') \u0026\u0026 col.field !== 'total_points';\r\n                            \r\n                            // Check if this is a team points column (should be merged)\r\n                            const isTeamPointsColumn = col.field === 'team_points';\r\n                            \r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "} else if (isOpponentColumn) {\r\n                                // Merge opponent column - only show in second row\r\n                                const td1 = document.createElement('td');\r\n                                td1.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                                td1.style.textAlign = 'center';\r\n                                td1.style.verticalAlign = 'middle';\r\n                                td1.setAttribute('rowspan', '2'); // Merge 2 rows\r\n                                td1.textContent = row2.rowData[flatIndex]; // Use second row data (opponent name)\r\n                                \r\n                                // Apply styles\r\n                                if (col.style) {\r\n                                    Object.entries(col.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                        td1.style[key] = value;\r\n                                    });\r\n                                }\r\n                                \r\n                                if (colGroup.style) {\r\n                                    Object.entries(colGroup.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                        td1.style[key] = value;\r\n                                    });\r\n                                }\r\n                                \r\n                                tr1.appendChild(td1);\r\n                                // Don't add to tr2 since it's merged\r\n                            ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Function to update table body with current data\r\n    function updateTableBody(tableData) {\r\n        tbody.innerHTML = '';  // Clear existing rows\r\n        \r\n        if (mergeCells) {\r\n            // Handle merged cells logic\r\n            updateTableBodyWithMergedCells(tableData);\r\n        } else {\r\n            // Original logic for regular tables\r\n            updateTableBodyRegular(tableData);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Function to update table body with merged cells\r\n    function updateTableBodyWithMergedCells(tableData) {\r\n        // Group rows by pairs (every 2 rows form a match)\r\n        const groupedRows = [];\r\n        for (let i = 0; i \u003c tableData.length; i += 2) {\r\n            if (i + 1 \u003c tableData.length) {\r\n                groupedRows.push([\r\n                    { rowData: tableData[i], rowIndex: i },\r\n                    { rowData: tableData[i + 1], rowIndex: i + 1 }\r\n                ]);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Create rows for each group\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Function to update table body with current data\r\n    function updateTableBody(tableData) {\r\n        tbody.innerHTML = '';  // Clear existing rows\r\n        \r\n        if (mergeCells) {\r\n            // Handle merged cells logic\r\n            updateTableBodyWithMergedCells(tableData);\r\n        } else {\r\n            // Original logic for regular tables\r\n            updateTableBodyRegular(tableData);\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Function to update table body with merged cells\r\n    function updateTableBodyWithMergedCells(tableData) {\r\n        // Group rows by pairs (every 2 rows form a match)\r\n        const groupedRows = [];\r\n        for (let i = 0; i \u003c tableData.length; i += 2) {\r\n            if (i + 1 \u003c tableData.length) {\r\n                groupedRows.push([\r\n                    { rowData: tableData[i], rowIndex: i },\r\n                    { rowData: tableData[i + 1], rowIndex: i + 1 }\r\n                ]);\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        // Create rows for each group\r\n",

        "originalContents": "                            } else if (isPointsColumn || isTeamPointsColumn) {\r\n                                // Merge points columns - only show own team's points\r\n                                const td1 = document.createElement('td');\r\n                                td1.style.padding = '8px';\r\n                                td1.style.textAlign = 'center';\r\n                                td1.style.verticalAlign = 'middle';\r\n                                td1.setAttribute('rowspan', '2'); // Merge 2 rows\r\n                                \r\n                                // Get own team's points (first row)\r\n                                const ownTeamPoints = row1.rowData[flatIndex];\r\n                                td1.textContent = ownTeamPoints;\r\n                                \r\n                                // Apply styles\r\n                                if (col.style) {\r\n                                    Object.entries(col.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                        td1.style[key] = value;\r\n                                    });\r\n                                }\r\n                                \r\n                                if (colGroup.style) {\r\n                                    Object.entries(colGroup.style).forEach(([key, value]) =\u003e {\r\n                                        td1.style[key] = value;\r\n                                    });\r\n                                }\r\n                                \r\n                                // Format values\r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n    // Create table wrapper for horizontal scroll\r\n    const tableWrapper = document.createElement('div');\r\n    tableWrapper.className = 'table-responsive';\r\n    \r\n    const table = document.createElement('table');\r\n    table.className = 'table table-striped table-hover';\r\n    \r\n    // Create header\r\n    const thead = document.createElement('thead');\r\n    const headerRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    \r\n    // Handle column groups if present\r\n    if (columns[0] \u0026\u0026 columns[0].children) {\r\n        // Add group headers\r\n        const groupHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        columns.forEach(group =\u003e {\r\n            const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n            th.textContent = group.title || '';\r\n            th.colSpan = group.children ? group.children.length : 1;\r\n            groupHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(groupHeaderRow);\r\n\r\n        // Add sub-headers\r\n        const subHeaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        columns.forEach(group =\u003e {\r\n            if (group.children) {\r\n                group.children.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n                    th.textContent = col.title || '';\r\n                    if (col.width) {\r\n                        th.style.minWidth = col.width;\r\n                    }\r\n                    subHeaderRow.appendChild(th);\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(subHeaderRow);\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Simple columns without groups\r\n        columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n            const th = document.createElement('th');\r\n            th.textContent = col.title || '';\r\n            if (col.width) {\r\n                th.style.minWidth = col.width;\r\n            }\r\n            headerRow.appendChild(th);\r\n        });\r\n        thead.appendChild(headerRow);\r\n    ",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n                    // Freeze the first two columns\r\n                    if (index \u003c 2) {\r\n                        td.style.position = 'sticky';\r\n                        td.style.left = &#96;${index * 100}px&#96;; // Adjust based on your layout\r\n                        td.style.zIndex = '1'; // Ensure it stays above other content\r\n                        td.style.backgroundColor = '#fff'; // Background color to prevent transparency\r\n                    }\r\n\r\n                    tr.appendChild(td);\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        tbody.appendChild(tr);\r\n    });\r\n\r\n    table.appendChild(tbody);\r\n    tableWrapper.appendChild(table);\r\n    document.getElementById(tableId).innerHTML = ''; // Clear existing content\r\n    document.getElementById(tableId).appendChild(tableWrapper); // Append new table\r\n\r\n    console.log(&#96;Table \"${tableId}\" successfully created/updated&#96;);\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction createTableBootstrap3(tableId, data, options = {}) {\r\n    // Check if the data has columns and data\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.error('Invalid data format');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Get table configuration\r\n    const config = data.config || {};\r\n    \r\n    // Get options with defaults\r\n    const { disablePositionCircle = false, mergeCells = false } = options;\r\n    \r\n    // Create table wrapper for horizontal scroll\r\n    const tableWrapper = document.createElement('div');\r\n    tableWrapper.className = 'table-responsive';\r\n\r\n    // Create table\r\n    const table = document.createElement('table');\r\n    table.className = 'table';\r\n    if (config.striped) table.classList.add('table-striped');\r\n    if (config.hover) table.classList.add('table-hover');\r\n    if (config.compact) table.classList.add('table-sm');\r\n    table.style.borderCollapse = 'collapse';\r\n",

Week {week}\"\r\n                )\r\n            \r\n            # Get team totals (computed data)\r\n            team_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\r\n            \r\n            # Get opponent team totals\r\n            opponent_filters = {\r\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\r\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': True, 'operator': 'eq'}\r\n            }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",
