_**Agent (2025-07-22 20:47:16Z)**_

Thank you for clarifying! Here’s how to robustly add scatter plot support to your API test page (`test.html`):

---

## 1. **Add a Section for Scatter Plots**

Add a new card (or tab, if you want) for scatter plots, e.g. "Points vs. Average".

---

## 2. **Add a Canvas for the Scatter Plot**

Add this where you want the scatter plot to appear:
```html
<div class="card mb-4">
  <div class="card-header">
    <h5>Points vs. Average (Scatter Plot)</h5>
  </div>
  <div class="card-body">
    <canvas id="chartTeamPointsVsAverage" style="width: 100%; min-width: 100%; height: 300px;"></canvas>
    <button id="loadScatterPlotBtn" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm mt-2">Load Scatter Plot</button>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## 3. **Add JavaScript to Load and Render the Scatter Plot**

Add this to your `<script>` block at the end of the file:

```javascript
function renderScatterPlot() {
    // Get current selection
    const season = document.querySelector('input[name="season"]:checked')?.value;
    const league = document.querySelector('input[name="league"]:checked')?.value;
    // You can add week/team if needed

    if (!season || !league) {
        alert('Please select a season and league.');
        return;
    }

    fetch(`/league/get_team_points_vs_average?season=${encodeURIComponent(season)}&league=${encodeURIComponent(league)}`)
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (!data || typeof data !== 'object' || Array.isArray(data)) {
                console.error('No valid data for scatter plot:', data);
                return;
            }
            const axis_labels = {x: 'Points', y: 'Average'};
            if (typeof createScatterChart_vanilla === 'function') {
                createScatterChart_vanilla(data, 'chartTeamPointsVsAverage', 'Points vs. Average', axis_labels);
            } else {
                console.error('createScatterChart_vanilla is not defined');
            }
        })
        .catch(err => console.error('Error fetching scatter plot data:', err));
}

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const btn = document.getElementById('loadScatterPlotBtn');
    if (btn) {
        btn.addEventListener('click', renderScatterPlot);
    }
});
```

---

## 4. **How it Works**

- The user selects season/league (and optionally week/team).
- They click "Load Scatter Plot".
- The plot is fetched and rendered in the canvas.
- Defensive checks prevent errors if data is missing or the canvas is not present.

---

## 5. **Optional: Auto-load on selection change**

If you want the scatter plot to auto-update when the user changes season/league, add this to your change handler:

```javascript
document.addEventListener('change', event => {
    if (event.target.name === 'season' || event.target.name === 'league') {
        renderScatterPlot();
    }
});
```

---

Would you like me to make these changes directly to your `test.html`?  
If yes, I’ll update the file for you!

_**Agent (2025-07-22 20:47:17Z)**_

Great catch! The legend is correct, but the scatter plot itself does not use the palette colors because the current `createScatterChart_vanilla` function does not assign colors per team using `getTeamColor(team, idx)`—it just uses a default color.

---

## How to Fix

You need to update the `createScatterChart_vanilla` function (in your `charts.html`) so that each team's dataset uses the palette color:

**Find this code:**
```javascript
const datasets = Object.entries(data).map(([team, points]) => ({
    label: team,
    data: points.map(point => ({x: point[0], y: point[1]})),
    borderColor: getTeamColor(team, Object.keys(data).length),
    backgroundColor: getTeamColor(team, Object.keys(data).length),
    pointRadius: 5
}));
```

**Change it to:**
```javascript
const teams = Object.keys(data);
const datasets = teams.map((team, idx) => ({
    label: team,
    data: data[team].map(point => ({x: point[0], y: point[1]})),
    borderColor: getTeamColor(team, idx),
    backgroundColor: getTeamColor(team, idx),
    pointRadius: 5
}));
```

- This ensures each team’s points use the same color as in the legend and the palette.

---

## Summary

- Update `createScatterChart_vanilla` to use `getTeamColor(team, idx)` for both `borderColor` and `backgroundColor` for each team’s dataset.
- The legend and the plot will now match and use the selected palette.

_**Agent (2025-07-22 20:47:16Z)**_

Absolutely! The best and most robust way to invert the y-axis in ECharts is to use the built-in `inverse: true` property on the yAxis, and **not** to transform the data or swap min/max values yourself.

Here’s how to rework `createLineChart` for correct y-axis inversion:

---

## **Key Points for ECharts yAxis Inversion**

- Use `yAxis: { inverse: true }` to invert the axis (lower values at the top, higher at the bottom).
- Do **not** transform the data or swap min/max.
- Let ECharts handle the axis and label rendering.
- Only use a custom `axisLabel.formatter` if you want to change the label text (not for inversion).

---

## **Reworked `createLineChart` Implementation**

Replace your current `createLineChart` with this:

```javascript
function createLineChart(data, order, containerId, title, labels, invertYAxis = false, yAxisRange = null) {
    const container = document.getElementById(containerId);
    if (!container) {
        console.error('createLineChart: Container not found:', containerId);
        return;
    }

    // Dispose of existing chart instance if it exists
    const existingChart = echarts.getInstanceByDom(container);
    if (existingChart) {
        existingChart.dispose();
    }

    if (order == null) {
        order = Object.keys(data);
    }

    // Calculate y-axis range if requested
    let yMin, yMax;
    if (yAxisRange === 'auto') {
        const allValues = order.map(team => data[team]).flat();
        yMin = Math.max(Math.min(...allValues) - 10, 0);
        yMax = Math.max(...allValues) + 10;
    } else if (yAxisRange === 'exact') {
        const allValues = order.map(team => data[team]).flat();
        yMin = Math.min(...allValues);
        yMax = Math.max(...allValues);
    }

    // Create series from the data using the specified order
    const series = order.map((team, idx) => ({
        name: team,
        type: 'line',
        data: data[team],
        lineStyle: {
            color: getTeamColor(team, idx),
            width: 2
        },
        itemStyle: {
            color: getTeamColor(team, idx)
        },
        smooth: false
    }));

    // Chart options
    const chartOptions = {
        tooltip: {
            trigger: 'axis'
        },
        legend: {
            show: false
        },
        grid: {
            top: '10%',
            right: '5%',
            bottom: '10%',
            left: '5%',
            containLabel: true
        },
        xAxis: {
            type: 'category',
            data: labels,
            axisLine: { show: false },
            splitLine: { show: true }
        },
        yAxis: {
            type: 'value',
            min: yMin,
            max: yMax,
            inverse: invertYAxis, // <-- Use ECharts built-in inversion
            axisLine: { show: true },
            axisTick: { show: true },
            splitLine: { show: true }
            // No custom formatter needed for inversion!
        },
        series: series,
        animation: false
    };

    // Set the chart options with clear flag
    const chart = echarts.init(container, null, {
        devicePixelRatio: window.devicePixelRatio,
        renderer: 'canvas'
    });
    chart.setOption(chartOptions, true);

    // Clean up old resize listener if it exists
    if (container._echartResizeHandler) {
        window.removeEventListener('resize', container._echartResizeHandler);
    }
    // Add new resize listener
    const resizeHandler = () => { chart.resize(); };
    window.addEventListener('resize', resizeHandler);
    container._echartResizeHandler = resizeHandler;

    return chart;
}
```

---

## **Summary**

- The only thing you need to do to invert the y-axis is set `inverse: invertYAxis` in the yAxis config.
- Do **not** transform the data or swap min/max.
- ECharts will handle the axis and label rendering correctly.

---

Would you like me to apply this change directly to your code?

---

_**User (2025-07-22 20:47:17Z)**_

okay, so i am still trying t figure out, why inversing the axis does not work properly.
if a hard code the inverse = true in createChartLine (line 174), then the chart is properly drawn. if i use the passen argument invertYAxis, the charts is the same as if I set it to "false". 
see the attached example for an expemplary function call

can you elaborate in that?


---

_**Agent (2025-07-22 20:47:17Z)**_

This is a great observation and a classic JavaScript/parameter-passing gotcha!

---

## **What’s Happening?**

- When you hardcode `inverse: true` in the ECharts config, the y-axis is inverted as expected.
- When you use `inverse: invertYAxis` (where `invertYAxis` is a function parameter), it **should** work the same way.
- But in your case, passing `true` as the argument does **not** invert the axis, and it behaves as if it’s `false`.

---

## **Possible Causes**

### 1. **Type Mismatch or Falsy Value**
- If `invertYAxis` is not a boolean `true` but a string `"true"` or some other truthy/falsy value, ECharts may not recognize it.
- ECharts expects a real boolean, not a string or undefined.

### 2. **How the Argument is Passed**
- If you call `createLineChart(..., true, 'exact')` it should work.
- If you call `createLineChart(..., 'true', 'exact')` (with quotes), it will not work as expected.
- If you pass `undefined`, `null`, or a variable that is not strictly `true`, ECharts will treat it as `false`.

### 3. **Default Parameter Value**
- If you have `invertYAxis = false` as a default, but call the function without specifying it, it will be `false`.

### 4. **Overwriting the Option**
- If you set `inverse: invertYAxis` but later in your code or in a theme, the `inverse` property is overwritten, it will not work.

---

## **How to Debug**

Add a `console.log` right before you create the chart:

```javascript
console.log('invertYAxis argument:', invertYAxis, typeof invertYAxis);
```

And right before you set the option:

```javascript
console.log('ECharts yAxis.inverse:', chartOptions.yAxis.inverse);
```

---

## **How to Fix**

**Always ensure you pass a real boolean:**
- When calling: `createLineChart(..., true, ...)` (no quotes)
- If you get the value from a form or attribute, convert it:  
  `invertYAxis = (someValue === true || someValue === 'true');`

**Example:**
```javascript
function createLineChart(..., invertYAxis = false, ...) {
    invertYAxis = (invertYAxis === true || invertYAxis === 'true');
    // ... rest of function ...
}
```

---

## **Summary Table**

| Value passed         | Result in ECharts | Effect         |
|----------------------|-------------------|---------------|
| `true` (boolean)     | `true`            | Inverted      |
| `"true"` (string)    | `false`           | Not inverted  |
| `false` (boolean)    | `false`           | Not inverted  |
| `"false"` (string)   | `false`           | Not inverted  |
| `undefined`/`null`   | `false`           | Not inverted  |

---

## **Action Steps**

1. Add a `console.log` to check the value and type of `invertYAxis` at runtime.
2. Ensure you always pass a boolean, not a string.
3. Optionally, coerce the value to boolean at the start of your function.

---

**Would you like me to update your `createLineChart` to coerce the parameter and add debug logging?**  
This will guarantee the axis inversion works as expected!

---

_**User (2025-07-22 20:47:18Z)**_

I got the feeling that the charts and tambles use somehow the same color palette but they are not using the same colors for the same team in the different views. make sure a team is always using the same color

---

_**Agent (2025-07-22 20:47:18Z)**_

Great observation!  
The issue is that the color assignment for teams is currently based on their **index in the order array** for each chart/table. If the order of teams changes between charts/tables (e.g., sorted differently, filtered, or missing teams), the same team may get a different color.

---

## **How to Guarantee Consistent Team Colors**

**Best Practice:**  
Assign each team a color based on a stable mapping (e.g., alphabetical order, or a hash of the team name), not their index in a possibly changing array.

---

### **How to Implement This**

#### 1. **Stable Team Order**

- Compute a global, stable team order (e.g., all teams in the league, sorted alphabetically).
- Use the index of the team in this global order for color assignment.

#### 2. **Hash-Based Color Assignment (Alternative)**

- Use a hash of the team name to pick a color from the palette. This guarantees the same team always gets the same color, regardless of order.

---

### **Recommended Implementation: Hash-Based**

**Update your `getTeamColor` function in `charts.html` to:**

```javascript
function getTeamColor(team) {
  // Hash the team name to a palette index
  let hash = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < team.length; i++) {
    hash = team.charCodeAt(i) + ((hash << 5) - hash);
  }
  const index = Math.abs(hash) % currentPalette.length;
  return currentPalette[index];
}
```

**Then, everywhere you call `getTeamColor(team, idx)`, just call `getTeamColor(team)` instead.**

---

### **What to Change in Your Code**

- In all chart/table rendering code, replace `getTeamColor(team, idx)` with `getTeamColor(team)`.
- Remove the `idx` parameter from all calls and from the function definition.

---

### **Result**

- The same team will always have the same color in all charts and tables, regardless of order or filtering.
- The palette switcher will still work as before.

---

Would you like me to make this change for you?

@@ -55,9 +55,6 @@

_**Agent (2025-07-22 20:47:17Z)**_

You're correct—if the "week" and "team" buttons are not being populated, it's likely due to a missing or broken call to the function that loads available weeks and teams when the season or league changes.

This is often caused by:
- Not calling `updateAvailableOptions()` after a change in season or league.
- The event listeners for the radio buttons not triggering the function that fetches and populates weeks/teams.

---

## **How to Fix**

### 1. **Ensure updateAvailableOptions() is Called**

After a user selects a new season or league, you must call `updateAvailableOptions()` to fetch and populate the week and team buttons.

### 2. **Check Your Event Listeners**

Your event listener for changes should look like this (for the test page):

```javascript
document.addEventListener('change', event => {
    if (event.target.name === 'season' || event.target.name === 'league') {
        updateAvailableOptions();
        // ...other refreshes...
    }
    // ...other handlers...
});
```

### 3. **Check the Implementation of updateAvailableOptions()**

Make sure this function fetches both weeks and teams and updates the DOM.

---

## **What to Do**

- Add or restore the call to `updateAvailableOptions()` in your change event handler for `season` and `league`.
- Make sure `updateAvailableOptions()` is not commented out and is working as expected.

---

## **Would you like me to update your test page to ensure week and team buttons are always populated when season or league changes?**  
If yes, I’ll make the change for you!

_**Agent**_

Here’s how to ensure the "week" and "team" buttons are always populated on `/team/stats.html`:

---

## **Problem**
- The current code only loads teams on page load, and only loads weeks/seasons when a team is selected.
- If the user changes the season, the week buttons may not update, and vice versa.

---

## **Solution**
- Always call `updateAvailableOptions()` when the season or team changes.
- `updateAvailableOptions()` should fetch and update both weeks and teams based on the current selection.

---

## **Implementation**

### 1. **Add/Update updateAvailableOptions()**

Add this function (or update it if it exists):

```javascript
function updateAvailableOptions() {
    const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;
    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name="season"]:checked')?.value;

    if (selectedTeam) {
        updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam);
        if (selectedSeason) {
            updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason);
        }
    }
}
```

### 2. **Update Event Listeners**

Update your event listeners to call `updateAvailableOptions()` whenever the team or season changes:

```javascript
document.addEventListener('change', event => {
    if (event.target.name === 'season') {
        updateAvailableOptions();
    }
    if (event.target.id === 'teamSelect') {
        updateAvailableOptions();
    }
    // Add other handlers for week if needed
});
```

### 3. **Ensure updateSeasonButtons and updateWeekButtons Work**

Make sure these functions fetch and update the buttons as before.

---

## **Would you like me to apply these changes directly to your `/team/stats.html`?**  
If yes, I’ll update the file for you!

_**Agent**_

Here’s what’s happening and how to fix it:

---

## **Diagnosis**

- The team dropdown (`teamSelect`) is populated on page load.
- When a team is selected, `updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam)` is called, which fetches available seasons for that team and populates the season buttons.
- When a season is selected, `updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, this.value)` is called, which fetches available weeks for that team and season and populates the week buttons.

**However:**
- If you change the team, the season radio buttons are re-rendered, but the week buttons are only updated when a season radio is clicked, not immediately after the team changes.
- If you change the season, the week buttons are updated, but only if a team is already selected.

---

## **Solution**

- When a team is selected, after populating the season buttons, also select the first available season and immediately call `updateWeekButtons` for that team and season.
- When a season is selected, always call `updateWeekButtons` for the currently selected team and season.

---

## **Implementation**

Update `updateSeasonButtons` to:
1. After rendering the season buttons, select the first available season (if none is selected).
2. Call `updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason)` immediately after rendering the season buttons.

Update the event listener for the team dropdown to:
- After calling `updateSeasonButtons(selectedTeam)`, also call `updateWeekButtons(selectedTeam, selectedSeason)` if a season is available.

---

Would you like me to implement these changes directly in your `/team/stats.html`?

---

+                     if (weekInput) {
+                         weekInput.checked = true;
+                         weekInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
                      }
                  }

        "contents": "\r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        // Update available weeks\r\n        fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" \r\n                           value=\"${week}\" ${week.toString() === selectedWeek ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\r\n                // Select first week by default if none selected\r\n                let weekInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked');\r\n                if (!weekInput \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    weekInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${weeks[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (weekInput) {\r\n                        weekInput.checked = true;\r\n                        weekInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n            .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cstrong\u003eError loading weeks:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                &#96;;\r\n            });\r\n",

'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;\r\n                // Select first week by default if none selected\r\n                let weekInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked');\r\n                if (!weekInput \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    weekInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"week\"][value=\"${weeks[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (weekInput) {\r\n                        weekInput.checked = true;\r\n                        weekInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n            .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cstrong\u003eError loading weeks:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                &#96;;\r\n            });\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function handleWeekTeamSelection() {\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedWeek) url.searchParams.set('week', selectedWeek);\r\n    if (selectedTeam) url.searchParams.set('team', selectedTeam);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n        \r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n\r\n        \r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        }\r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 810,

          },

            "lineNumber": 819,

            "lineNumber": 820,
            "text": "    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r"

        "originalContents": "function handleWeekTeamSelection() {\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedWeek) url.searchParams.set('week', selectedWeek);\r\n    if (selectedTeam) url.searchParams.set('team', selectedTeam);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n        \r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n\r\n        \r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        }\r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch4 data-i18n=\"league_statistics\"\u003eLeague Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"season\"\u003eSeason\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"league\"\u003eLeague\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsLeague\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Leagues will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"week\"\u003eWeek\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsWeek\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Weeks will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-12\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"team\"\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsTeam\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Teams will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Function to update week-specific content\r\n    function updateWeekContent() {\r\n        // Show the table and hide the message\r\n        const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n        const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n        \r\n        if (messageArea) messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n        \r\n        // Update tables and scores\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Function to load leagues\r\n    function loadLeagues() {\r\n        fetch('/league/get_available_leagues')\r\n            .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n            .then(leagues =\u003e {\r\n                const buttonsLeague = leagues.map(league =\u003e &#96;\r\n                    \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"league\" id=\"league_${league}\" \r\n                           value=\"${league}\" ${league === selectedLeague ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"league_${league}\"\u003e${league}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = buttonsLeague;\r\n                \r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function handleSelectionChange() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedSeason) url.searchParams.set('season', selectedSeason);\r\n    if (selectedLeague) url.searchParams.set('league', selectedLeague);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n    const tableArea = document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        // Also update week-specific content when season/league changes\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        \r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r\nfunction updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n\r\n    console.log(\"Updating available options for:\", {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague\r\n    });\r\n",

        "originalContents": "function handleSelectionChange() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedSeason) url.searchParams.set('season', selectedSeason);\r\n    if (selectedLeague) url.searchParams.set('league', selectedLeague);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n    const tableArea = document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 selectedLeague) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        // Also update week-specific content when season/league changes\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        \r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        tableArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Update available weeks and teams when season/league selection changes\r\nfunction updateAvailableOptions() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n\r\n    console.log(\"Updating available options for:\", {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague\r\n    });\r\n",

        "contents": "                    fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_teams?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n                        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                        .then(teams =\u003e {\r\n                            const teamButtons = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\r\n                                \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"team\" id=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\" \r\n                                       value=\"${team}\" ${team === selectedTeam ? 'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                            &#96;).join('');\r\n                            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Select the team if it was in URL\r\n                            if (selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 teams.includes(selectedTeam)) {\r\n                                const teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${selectedTeam}\"]&#96;);\r\n                                if (teamInput) {\r\n                                    teamInput.checked = true;\r\n                                }\r\n                            }\r\n                        })\r\n                        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                            console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\r\n                            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                            &#96;;\r\n                        });\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n",

'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                            &#96;).join('');\r\n                            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\r\n                            \r\n                            // Select the team if it was in URL\r\n                            if (selectedTeam \u0026\u0026 teams.includes(selectedTeam)) {\r\n                                const teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${selectedTeam}\"]&#96;);\r\n                                if (teamInput) {\r\n                                    teamInput.checked = true;\r\n                                }\r\n                            }\r\n                        })\r\n                        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                            console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\r\n                            document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                            &#96;;\r\n                        });\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTableLeagueHistory() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'block';\r\n        document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'none';\r\n    document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('leagueTableHistory', '/league/get_league_history', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Initialize the page\r\nfunction initializePage() {\r\n    console.log(\"Initializing page...\");\r\n    \r\n    // Get URL parameters\r\n    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n    const selectedSeason = urlParams.get('season');\r\n    const selectedLeague = urlParams.get('league');\r\n    const selectedWeek = urlParams.get('week');\r\n    const selectedTeam = urlParams.get('team');\r\n    \r\n    console.log(\"URL parameters:\", { season: selectedSeason, league: selectedLeague, week: selectedWeek, team: selectedTeam });\r\n\r\n    // Function to update all content\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        handleSelectionChange();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        handleWeekTeamSelection();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n    }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 498,
            "text": "function updateTableLeagueHistory() {\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 499,
            "text": "    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 500,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 501,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 502,
            "text": "    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 503,
            "text": "        document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'block';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 504,
            "text": "        document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'none';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 505,
            "text": "        return;\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 506,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 507,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 508,
            "text": "    document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'none';\r"

          },

            "lineNumber": 510,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 511,
            "text": "    // Fetch and display table\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 512,
            "text": "    fetchAndRenderTable('leagueTableHistory', '/league/get_league_history', {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 513,
            "text": "        season: selectedSeason,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 514,
            "text": "        league: selectedLeague\r"

            "lineNumber": 517,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 518,
            "text": "// Initialize the page\r"
          },

        ],
        "originalContents": "function updateTableLeagueHistory() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'block';\r\n        document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    document.getElementById('selectionMessage').style.display = 'none';\r\n    document.getElementById('leagueTableHistory').style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('leagueTableHistory', '/league/get_league_history', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Initialize the page\r\nfunction initializePage() {\r\n    console.log(\"Initializing page...\");\r\n    \r\n    // Get URL parameters\r\n    const urlParams = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);\r\n    const selectedSeason = urlParams.get('season');\r\n    const selectedLeague = urlParams.get('league');\r\n    const selectedWeek = urlParams.get('week');\r\n    const selectedTeam = urlParams.get('team');\r\n    \r\n    console.log(\"URL parameters:\", { season: selectedSeason, league: selectedLeague, week: selectedWeek, team: selectedTeam });\r\n\r\n    // Function to update all content\r\n    function updateAllContent() {\r\n        handleSelectionChange();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        handleWeekTeamSelection();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n    }\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 539
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 498
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/league/stats.html"
      },
      "score": 0.4746094048023224
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Add event listeners for future changes\r\n    // --- Centralized Refresh Functions ---\r\n    function refreshAllLeagueContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        // Add any other league-wide refreshes here\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function refreshTeamContent() {\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        // Add any other team-specific refreshes here\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Palette switcher integration\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n        refreshTeamContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Clean Event Listeners ---\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season' || name === 'league' || name === 'week') {\r\n            refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'team') {\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'teamView') {\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 665,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 666,
            "text": "    // Add event listeners for future changes\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 667,
            "text": "    // --- Centralized Refresh Functions ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 668,
            "text": "    function refreshAllLeagueContent() {\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 669,
            "text": "        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r"

            "lineNumber": 670,
            "text": "        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r"

            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 681,
            "text": "    // Palette switcher integration\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 682,
            "text": "    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r"
          },
          {

          {

            "text": "        refreshTeamContent();\r"

            "lineNumber": 686,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 687,
            "text": "    // --- Clean Event Listeners ---\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 688,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Add event listeners for future changes\r\n    // --- Centralized Refresh Functions ---\r\n    function refreshAllLeagueContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        // Add any other league-wide refreshes here\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function refreshTeamContent() {\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        // Add any other team-specific refreshes here\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Palette switcher integration\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n        refreshTeamContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Clean Event Listeners ---\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season' || name === 'league' || name === 'week') {\r\n            refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'team') {\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'teamView') {\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedView = document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Update header\r\n    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r\n    document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata').innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r\n    \r\n    // Determine endpoint based on selected view\r\n    const endpoint = selectedView === 'headToHead' \r\n        ? '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table'\r\n        : '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r\n    \r\n    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        options: {\r\n            disablePositionCircle: true,\r\n            mergeCells: selectedView === 'headToHead',\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r"

          },

            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "    document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata').innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "    // Determine endpoint based on selected view\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "    const endpoint = selectedView === 'headToHead' \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "        ? '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table'\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "        : '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,

            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "        season: selectedSeason,\r"

            "lineNumber": 406,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,

          {

        "originalContents": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedView = document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Update header\r\n    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r\n    document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata').innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r\n    \r\n    // Determine endpoint based on selected view\r\n    const endpoint = selectedView === 'headToHead' \r\n        ? '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table'\r\n        : '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r\n    \r\n    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        options: {\r\n            disablePositionCircle: true,\r\n            mergeCells: selectedView === 'headToHead',\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTableLeagueWeek() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedWeek) {\r\n        // Show message when no week is selected\r\n        const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n        const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n        \r\n        if (messageArea) {\r\n            messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n            messageArea.innerHTML = window.translations ? (window.translations['please_select_match_day'] || 'Please select a match day.') : 'Please select a match day.';\r\n        }\r\n        if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Show the table and hide the message\r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (messageArea) messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('tableLeagueWeek', '/league/get_league_week_table', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        ],
        "originalContents": "function updateTableLeagueWeek() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedWeek) {\r\n        // Show message when no week is selected\r\n        const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n        const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n        \r\n        if (messageArea) {\r\n            messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n            messageArea.innerHTML = window.translations ? (window.translations['please_select_match_day'] || 'Please select a match day.') : 'Please select a match day.';\r\n        }\r\n        if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Show the table and hide the message\r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (messageArea) messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('tableLeagueWeek', '/league/get_league_week_table', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 498
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 461
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/league/stats.html"
      },
      "score": 0.4609375
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateChartsLeague() {\r\n    console.log('🔍 updateChartsLeague function called');\r\n    \r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    console.log('🔍 Selected season/league:', selectedSeason, selectedLeague);\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        console.log('🔍 Missing season or league, returning early');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and create position charts\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_positions?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            // Create labels based on number of weeks\r\n            const numWeeks = Object.values(data.data)[0].length;\r\n            const matchDayFormat = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_format'] || 'Match Day #{week}') : 'Match Day #{week}';\r\n            const labels = Array.from({length: numWeeks}, (_, i) =\u003e matchDayFormat.replace('{week}', i + 1));\r\n\r\n            // Create cumulative positions chart\r\n            createLineChart(\r\n                data.data,\r\n                data.sorted_by_total,\r\n                'chartTeamPositionCumulated',\r\n                'ERROR: Position in Season Progress',\r\n                labels,\r\n                false,\r\n                'exact'\r\n            );\r\n\r\n            updateSharedLegend(data.sorted_by_total);\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error loading team positions:', error);\r\n        });\r\n\r\n    // Fetch and create points charts\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_points?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            // Create labels based on number of weeks\r\n            const numWeeks = Object.values(data.data)[0].length;\r\n            const matchDayFormat = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_format'] || 'Match Day #{week}') : 'Match Day #{week}';\r\n            const labels = Array.from({length: numWeeks}, (_, i) =\u003e matchDayFormat.replace('{week}', i + 1));\r\n\r\n            createScatterChartMultiAxis(\r\n",

'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"season_${season}\"\u003e${season}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n            &#96;).join('');\r\n            document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = buttonsSeason;\r\n            \r\n            // Always load leagues, regardless of whether a season is selected\r\n            loadLeagues();\r\n            \r\n            // If we have a selected season, select it\r\n            if (selectedSeason \u0026\u0026 seasons.includes(selectedSeason)) {\r\n                const seasonInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"season\"][value=\"${selectedSeason}\"]&#96;);\r\n                if (seasonInput) {\r\n                    seasonInput.checked = true;\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error loading seasons:', error);\r\n            document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading seasons:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        });\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n        \u003c!-- Team Details Section --\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv\u003e\r\n                        \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"score_sheet_selected_team\"\u003eScore Sheet for Selected Team\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                        \u003cdiv id=\"teamDetailsMetadata\" class=\"text-muted small\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"btn-group\" role=\"group\" aria-label=\"View options\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"teamView\" id=\"teamViewDetails\" value=\"details\" checked\u003e\r\n                        \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" for=\"teamViewDetails\" data-i18n=\"details\"\u003eDetails\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                        \r\n                        \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"teamView\" id=\"teamViewHeadToHead\" value=\"headToHead\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-sm\" for=\"teamViewHeadToHead\" data-i18n=\"head_to_head\"\u003eHead-to-Head\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"teamTableWeekDetails\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Team table will be dynamically inserted here --\u003e\r\n                        \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-info\" data-i18n=\"please_select_team\"\u003ePlease select a team to display the score sheet.\u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e  \r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block scripts %}\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n\r\nlet positionChart = null;\r\n\r\n",

            "text": "                        \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"score_sheet_selected_team\"\u003eScore Sheet for Selected Team\u003c/h5\u003e\r"

        "originalContents": "\r\n        \u003c!-- Team Details Section --\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"card-header d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv\u003e\r\n                        \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"score_sheet_selected_team\"\u003eScore Sheet for Selected Team\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                        \u003cdiv id=\"teamDetailsMetadata\" class=\"text-muted small\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"btn-group\" role=\"group\" aria-label=\"View options\"\u003e\r\n (window.translations['match_day_format'] || 'Match Day #{week}') : 'Match Day #{week}';\r\n            const labels = Array.from({length: numWeeks}, (_, i) =\u003e matchDayFormat.replace('{week}', i + 1));\r\n            \r\n            console.log('Creating chart with weeks:', numWeeks, 'labels:', labels.length);\r\n\r\n            try {\r\n                createLineChart(\r\n                    data.data,\r\n                    data.sorted_by_total,\r\n                    'chartTeamAverageScoreWeekly',\r\n                    'Average per Match Day',\r\n                    labels,\r\n                    false,\r\n                    'auto'\r\n                );\r\n                \r\n                console.log('✅ Team averages chart created successfully');\r\n            } catch (error) {\r\n                console.error('❌ Error creating team averages chart:', error);\r\n            }\r\n            console.log('=== END TEAM AVERAGES DEBUG ===');\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('❌ Error loading team averages:', error);\r\n        });\r\n\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Initial load\r\ndocument.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initializePage);\r\n\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n{% endblock %}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateHonorScores() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedWeek) {\r\n        // Clear honor scores when no week is selected\r\n        const pleaseSelectText = window.translations ? (window.translations['please_select_match_day'] || 'Please select a match day.') : 'Please select a match day.';\r\n        document.getElementById('individualScores').innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${pleaseSelectText}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n        document.getElementById('teamScores').innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${pleaseSelectText}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n        document.getElementById('individualAverages').innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${pleaseSelectText}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n        document.getElementById('teamAverages').innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${pleaseSelectText}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n",

        "originalContents": "function updateHonorScores() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedWeek) {\r\n        // Clear honor scores when no week is selected\r\n        const pleaseSelectText = window.translations ? (window.translations['please_select_match_day'] || 'Please select a match day.') : 'Please select a match day.';\r\n        document.getElementById('individualScores').innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${pleaseSelectText}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n        document.getElementById('teamScores').innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${pleaseSelectText}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n        document.getElementById('individualAverages').innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${pleaseSelectText}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n        document.getElementById('teamAverages').innerHTML = &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"text-muted\"\u003e${pleaseSelectText}\u003c/div\u003e&#96;;\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n",

        "originalContents": "function updateSharedLegend(teams) {\r\n    const legendHtml = teams.map(team =\u003e &#96;\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"mx-3 mb-2 d-flex align-items-center\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv style=\"width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; background-color: ${getTeamColor(team)}; margin-right: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: white; font-weight: bold;\"\u003e\r\n                \r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cspan\u003e${team}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    &#96;).join('');\r\n    \r\n    document.getElementById('sharedLegend').innerHTML = legendHtml;\r\n    document.getElementById('sharedLegendMiddle').innerHTML = legendHtml;\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction updatePositionChart() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const currentWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n",

        "contents": "\r\n    \u003c!-- League Results - Match Day --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"league_results_match_day\"\u003eLeague Results - Match Day\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- Message Area --\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv id=\"weekMessage\" class=\"alert alert-info\" data-i18n=\"please_select_match_day\"\u003e\r\n                Please select a match day.\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \r\n            \u003c!-- Content Area --\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-8\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"tableLeagueWeek\" style=\"display: none\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Table will be dynamically inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    ",

response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            // Individual Scores\r\n            document.getElementById('individualScores').innerHTML = data.individual_scores\r\n                .map(item =\u003e &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e${item.player}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan class=\"fw-bold\"\u003e${item.score}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;).join('');\r\n            \r\n            // Team Scores\r\n            document.getElementById('teamScores').innerHTML = data.team_scores\r\n                .map(item =\u003e &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e${item.team}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan class=\"fw-bold\"\u003e${item.score}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;).join('');\r\n            \r\n            // Individual Averages\r\n            document.getElementById('individualAverages').innerHTML = data.individual_averages\r\n                .map(item =\u003e &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e${item.player}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan class=\"fw-bold\"\u003e${item.average.toFixed(1)}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;).join('');\r\n            \r\n            // Team Averages\r\n            document.getElementById('teamAverages').innerHTML = data.team_averages\r\n                .map(item =\u003e &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e${item.team}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan class=\"fw-bold\"\u003e${item.average.toFixed(1)}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;).join('');\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e console.error('Error:', error));\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction updateTeamAveragesChart() {\r\n    const selectedSeason =         "originalContents": "    fetch(&#96;/league/get_honor_scores?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}\u0026week=${selectedWeek}&#96;)\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            // Individual Scores\r\n            document.getElementById('individualScores').innerHTML = data.individual_scores\r\n                .map(item =\u003e &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e${item.player}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan class=\"fw-bold\"\u003e${item.score}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;).join('');\r\n            \r\n            // Team Scores\r\n            document.getElementById('teamScores').innerHTML = data.team_scores\r\n                .map(item =\u003e &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e${item.team}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan class=\"fw-bold\"\u003e${item.score}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;).join('');\r\n            \r\n            // Individual Averages\r\n            document.getElementById('individualAverages').innerHTML = data.individual_averages\r\n                .map(item =\u003e &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e${item.player}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan class=\"fw-bold\"\u003e${item.average.toFixed(1)}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;).join('');\r\n            \r\n            // Team Averages\r\n            document.getElementById('teamAverages').innerHTML = data.team_averages\r\n                .map(item =\u003e &#96;\u003cdiv class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan\u003e${item.team}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003cspan class=\"fw-bold\"\u003e${item.average.toFixed(1)}\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e&#96;).join('');\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e console.error('Error:', error));\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction updateTeamAveragesChart() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) return;\r\n",

          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 897

          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_averages?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            const ctx = document.getElementById('teamAveragesChart').getContext('2d');\r\n            \r\n            // Destroy existing chart if it exists\r\n            if (window.teamAveragesChart instanceof Chart) {\r\n                window.teamAveragesChart.destroy();\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            window.teamAveragesChart = new Chart(ctx, {\r\n                type: 'line',\r\n                data: {\r\n                    labels: data.map(d =\u003e &#96;Week ${d.week}&#96;),\r\n                    datasets: [{\r\n                        label: 'Average Points',\r\n                        data: data.map(d =\u003e d.average),\r\n                        borderColor: '#6FAED4',\r\n                        backgroundColor: '#6FAED4',\r\n                        tension: 0.1\r\n                    }]\r\n                },\r\n                options: {\r\n                    responsive: true,\r\n                    plugins: {\r\n                        title: {\r\n                            display: true,\r\n                            text: &#96;Average Points for ${selectedTeam}&#96;\r\n                        }\r\n                    },\r\n                    scales: {\r\n                        y: {\r\n                            beginAtZero: true\r\n                        }\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_averages?season=${selectedSeason}\u0026league=${selectedLeague}&#96;)\r\n        .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            const ctx = document.getElementById('teamAveragesChart').getContext('2d');\r\n            \r\n            // Destroy existing chart if it exists\r\n            if (window.teamAveragesChart instanceof Chart) {\r\n                window.teamAveragesChart.destroy();\r\n            }\r\n            \r\n            window.teamAveragesChart = new Chart(ctx, {\r\n                type: 'line',\r\n                data: {\r\n                    labels: data.map(d =\u003e &#96;Week ${d.week}&#96;),\r\n                    datasets: [{\r\n                        label: 'Average Points',\r\n                        data: data.map(d =\u003e d.average),\r\n                        borderColor: '#6FAED4',\r\n                        backgroundColor: '#6FAED4',\r\n                        tension: 0.1\r\n                    }]\r\n                },\r\n                options: {\r\n                    responsive: true,\r\n                    plugins: {\r\n                        title: {\r\n                            display: true,\r\n                            text: &#96;Average Points for ${selectedTeam}&#96;\r\n                        }\r\n                    },\r\n                    scales: {\r\n                        y: {\r\n                            beginAtZero: true\r\n                        }\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTablePosition(data) {\r\n    const table = document.getElementById('positionHistoryTable');\r\n    \r\n    // Update headers\r\n    const headerRow = table.querySelector('thead tr');\r\n    headerRow.innerHTML = '\u003cth\u003eTeam\u003c/th\u003e';\r\n    data.weeks.forEach(week =\u003e {\r\n        headerRow.innerHTML += &#96;\r\n            \u003cth colspan=\"2\"\u003eWeek ${week}\u003c/th\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    // Add subheader row for Points/Average\r\n    const subheaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    subheaderRow.innerHTML = '\u003cth\u003e\u003c/th\u003e';  // Empty cell for team name\r\n    data.weeks.forEach(() =\u003e {\r\n        subheaderRow.innerHTML += &#96;\r\n            \u003cth\u003ePoints\u003c/th\u003e\r\n            \u003cth\u003eAverage\u003c/th\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    });\r\n    table.querySelector('thead').appendChild(subheaderRow);\r\n    \r\n    // Update body\r\n    const tbody = table.querySelector('tbody');\r\n    tbody.innerHTML = '';\r\n    \r\n    data.data.forEach(teamData =\u003e {\r\n        const row = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        row.innerHTML = &#96;\u003ctd\u003e${teamData.team}\u003c/td\u003e&#96;;\r\n        \r\n        teamData.weeks.forEach(week =\u003e {\r\n            row.innerHTML += &#96;\r\n                \u003ctd\u003e${week.points.toFixed(1)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                \u003ctd\u003e${week.average.toFixed(2)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        tbody.appendChild(row);\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "function updateTablePosition(data) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "    const table = document.getElementById('positionHistoryTable');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "    // Update headers\r"

            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "    const headerRow = table.querySelector('thead tr');\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "    headerRow.innerHTML = '\u003cth\u003eTeam\u003c/th\u003e';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "    data.weeks.forEach(week =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424,
            "text": "        headerRow.innerHTML += &#96;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 425,
            "text": "            \u003cth colspan=\"2\"\u003eWeek ${week}\u003c/th\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 426,
            "text": "        &#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 427,
            "text": "    });\r"
          },

        "originalContents": "function updateTablePosition(data) {\r\n    const table = document.getElementById('positionHistoryTable');\r\n    \r\n    // Update headers\r\n    const headerRow = table.querySelector('thead tr');\r\n    headerRow.innerHTML = '\u003cth\u003eTeam\u003c/th\u003e';\r\n    data.weeks.forEach(week =\u003e {\r\n        headerRow.innerHTML += &#96;\r\n            \u003cth colspan=\"2\"\u003eWeek ${week}\u003c/th\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    });\r\n    \r\n    // Add subheader row for Points/Average\r\n    const subheaderRow = document.createElement('tr');\r\n    subheaderRow.innerHTML = '\u003cth\u003e\u003c/th\u003e';  // Empty cell for team name\r\n    data.weeks.forEach(() =\u003e {\r\n        subheaderRow.innerHTML += &#96;\r\n            \u003cth\u003ePoints\u003c/th\u003e\r\n            \u003cth\u003eAverage\u003c/th\u003e\r\n        &#96;;\r\n    });\r\n    table.querySelector('thead').appendChild(subheaderRow);\r\n    \r\n    // Update body\r\n    const tbody = table.querySelector('tbody');\r\n    tbody.innerHTML = '';\r\n    \r\n    data.data.forEach(teamData =\u003e {\r\n        const row = document.createElement('tr');\r\n        row.innerHTML = &#96;\u003ctd\u003e${teamData.team}\u003c/td\u003e&#96;;\r\n        \r\n        teamData.weeks.forEach(week =\u003e {\r\n            row.innerHTML += &#96;\r\n                \u003ctd\u003e${week.points.toFixed(1)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n                \u003ctd\u003e${week.average.toFixed(2)}\u003c/td\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        });\r\n        \r\n        tbody.appendChild(row);\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n\r\n",
